| where EventName in ("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted") 
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip = AdminIp
|count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| sort _count

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles RoleUpdated
| json "eventName", "to.capabilities", "operator.email", "operator.sourceIp"  as EventName, capabilities_updated, Admin, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName="RoleUpdated"
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
| parse regex field=capabilities_updated "\"(?<Capability>.*?)\"" multi nodrop
| count as Count by Capability
| sort by Count
| limit 10

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles (RoleCreated OR RoleUpdated OR RoleDeleted)
| json "eventName", "to.capabilities", "operator.email", "operator.sourceIp"  as EventName, capabilities_updated, Admin, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName in ("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted") 
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count as Count by EventName
| fillmissing values("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted") in EventName
| compare with timeshift 1d as Shift_1d

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles (RoleCreated OR RoleUpdated OR RoleDeleted)
| json "eventName", "to.capabilities", "operator.email", "operator.sourceIp"  as EventName, capabilities_updated, Admin, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName in ("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted") 
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
| timeslice 1d
|count as Count by _timeslice, EventName
| fillmissing timeslice(1d), values("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted") in EventName
| transpose row _timeslice column EventName

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles (RoleCreated OR RoleUpdated OR RoleDeleted)
| json "eventName", "to.capabilities", "operator.email", "operator.sourceIp"  as EventName, capabilities_updated, Admin, AdminIp nodrop
| if(isEmpty(Admin) , "SystemGenerated", Admin) as Admin
| where EventName in ("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted") AND EventName matches "{{EventName}}"
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"|count by Admin, EventName
| transpose row Admin column EventName as %"RoleCreated", %"RoleUpdated", %"RoleDeleted"
| sort by RoleCreated, RoleUpdated, RoleDeleted
| limit 5

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles (RoleCreated OR RoleUpdated OR RoleDeleted)
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "operator.email", "operator.id", "operator.sourceIp", "roleIdentity.roleId", "roleIdentity.roleName", "role.systemDefined", "to", "from" as EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, RoleId, RoleName, SystemDefined, CurrentValue, PreviousValue nodrop
| json field=CurrentValue "systemDefined", "capabilities[*]" as SystemDefinedUpdated, Capabilities nodrop
| parse field=Capabilities "[*]" as Capabilities nodrop
| replace(Capabilities, "\"", "") as Capabilities
| if(isNull(SystemDefined), if(isNull(SystemDefinedUpdated), "-", SystemDefinedUpdated) , SystemDefined) as SystemDefined
| if(isNull(Capabilities), "-" , Capabilities) as Capabilities
| where EventName in ("RoleCreated","RoleUpdated","RoleDeleted") 
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count by EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, RoleId, RoleName, SystemDefined, Capabilities
| sort by EventTime
| fields - _count, AdminId, RoleId

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles RoleCreated
| json "eventName", "role.systemDefined","operator.email", "operator.sourceIp"  as EventName, SystemDefined, Admin, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventNAme="RoleCreated" 
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
| count as Count by SystemDefined
| if(SystemDefined="true", "System Defined", "User Defined") as SystemDefined

dashboard: Enterprise Audit - User & Role Management Overview

queries.query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events
| where _sourceCategory in ("users", "roles", "userSessions")
| json "eventName", "operator.email" as EventName, User nodrop
| json "userSession.email" as LoginUser nodrop
| json "sessionIdentity.userEmail" as LogoutUser nodrop
| json "userIdentity.userEmail" as LockedUser nodrop
| if(isEmpty(LoginUser), if(isEmpty(LogoutUser), if(isEmpty(LockedUser), "", LockedUser),LogoutUser), LoginUser) as UserEmail
| if(isEmpty(UserEmail), User, UserEmail) as User
| count as Count by User
| sort by Count
| limit 10

_index=sumologic_audit_events
| where _sourceCategory in ("users", "roles", "userSessions")
| json "eventName", "operator.email" as EventName, User nodrop
| json "userSession.email" as LoginUser nodrop
| json "sessionIdentity.userEmail" as LogoutUser nodrop
| json "userIdentity.userEmail" as LockedUser nodrop
| if(isEmpty(LoginUser), if(isEmpty(LogoutUser), if(isEmpty(LockedUser), "", LockedUser),LogoutUser), LoginUser) as UserEmail
| if(isEmpty(UserEmail), User, UserEmail) as User
| count as Count by User, _sourceCategory
| transpose row User column _sourceCategory as %"userSessions", %"users", %"roles"
| sort by userSessions, users, roles
| limit 5

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=users (UserCreated OR UserUpdated OR UserDeleted)
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "operator.email", "operator.id", "operator.sourceIp", "userIdentity.userId", "userIdentity.userEmail", "user.firstName", "user.lastName", "user.active", "to", "from" as EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, UserId, TargetUserEmail, TargetUserFirstName, TargetUserLastName, IsTargetUserActive, CurrentValue, PreviousValue nodrop
| json field=CurrentValue "firstName", "lastName", "active" as UpdatedFirstName, UpdatedLastName, UpdatedIsActive nodrop
| if(isNull(TargetUserFirstName), if(isNull(UpdatedFirstName),"-",UpdatedFirstName) ,TargetUserFirstName) as TargetUserFirstName
| if(isNull(TargetUserLastName), if(isNull(UpdatedLastName),"-",UpdatedLastName) ,TargetUserLastName) as TargetUserLastName
| if(isNull(IsTargetUserActive), if(isNull(UpdatedIsActive),"-",UpdatedIsActive) ,IsTargetUserActive) as IsTargetUserActive
| where EventName in ("UserCreated","UserUpdated", "UserDeleted") 
| where  EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count by EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, UserId, TargetUserEmail, TargetUserFirstName, TargetUserLastName, IsTargetUserActive

| where  EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and Admin matches "{{Admin}}" and AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
| if(isNull(ActiveCreated), if(isNull(ActiveUpdated), "-", ActiveUpdated) ,ActiveCreated) as CurrentActive
| withtime CurrentActive
| most_recent(CurrentActive_withtime) as Status by UserId
| where Status!="-"
| count as Count by Status
| if(Status matches "true", "Active", "InActive") as Status

queries.query:
_index=sumologic_audit_events (_sourceCategory=users OR _sourceCategory=roles) (RolesAssignedToUserUpdated OR UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated)
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "operator.email","operator.id","operator.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName in ("RolesAssignedToUserUpdated","UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated")
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count as Count by Admin 
| sort by Count
| limit 5

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=users RolesAssignedToUserUpdated
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "rolesDeleted[*]", "operator.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, RolesRemoved, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName="RolesAssignedToUserUpdated"
| parse regex field=RolesRemoved "\"roleName\":\"(?<RoleName>.*?)\"" multi
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count as Count by RoleName
| sort by Count
| limit 10

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "usersDeleted[*]","operator.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, UsersRemoved, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName="UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated"
| parse regex field=UsersRemoved "\"userEmail\":\"(?<TargetUserEmail>.*?)\"" multi
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"|count as Count by TargetUserEmail
| sort by Count
| limit 10

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=users RolesAssignedToUserUpdated
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "rolesAdded[*]","operator.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, RolesAdded, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName="RolesAssignedToUserUpdated"
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
| parse regex field=RolesAdded "\"roleName\":\"(?<RoleName>.*?)\"" multi
|count as Count by RoleName
| sort by Count
| limit 10

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=users RolesAssignedToUserUpdated
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "operator.email","operator.id","operator.sourceIp", "userIdentity.userId","userIdentity.userEmail", "rolesAdded[*].roleName", "rolesDeleted[*].roleName" as EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, TargetUserId, TargetUserEmail, RolesAdded, RolesRemoved nodrop
| where EventName="RolesAssignedToUserUpdated"
| parse field=RolesAdded "[*]" as RolesAdded nodrop
| replace(RolesAdded, "\"", "") as RolesAdded
| replace(RolesAdded, "[]", "-") as RolesAdded
| parse field=RolesRemoved "[*]" as RolesRemoved nodrop
| replace(RolesRemoved, "\"", "") as RolesRemoved
| replace(RolesRemoved, "[]", "-") as RolesRemoved
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count by EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, TargetUserId, TargetUserEmail, RolesAdded, RolesRemoved
| sort by EventTime
| fields - _count, EventTime, EventName, AdminId, TargetUserId

_index=sumologic_audit_events (_sourceCategory=users OR _sourceCategory=roles) (RolesAssignedToUserUpdated OR UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated)
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "operator.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName in ("RolesAssignedToUserUpdated","UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated")
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip = AdminIp
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| sort _count

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "usersAdded[*]", "operator.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, UsersAdded, AdminIp nodrop
| where EventName="UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated"
| parse regex field=UsersAdded "\"userEmail\":\"(?<TargetUserEmail>.*?)\"" multi
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"|count as Count by TargetUserEmail
| sort by Count
| limit 10

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=roles UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "operator.email","operator.id","operator.sourceIp", "roleIdentity.roleId","roleIdentity.roleName", "usersAdded[*].userEmail", "usersDeleted[*].userEmail" as EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, RoleId, RoleName, UsersAdded, UsersRemoved nodrop
| where EventName="UsersAssignedToRoleUpdated"
| parse field=UsersAdded "[*]" as UsersAdded nodrop
| replace(UsersAdded, "\"", "") as UsersAdded
| replace(UsersAdded, "[]", "-") as UsersAdded
| parse field=UsersRemoved "[*]" as UsersRemoved nodrop
| replace(UsersRemoved, "\"", "") as UsersRemoved
| replace(UsersRemoved, "[]", "-") as UsersRemoved
| where AdminIp matches "{{AdminIp}}"
|count by EventName, EventTime, Admin, AdminId, AdminIp, RoleId, RoleName, UsersAdded, UsersRemoved
| sort by EventTime

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=userSessions UserUnlocked
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "accountId", "userIdentity", "operator", "userSession.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, AccountId, userIdentity, operator, UserIp nodrop
| where EventName="UserUnlocked"
| json field=userIdentity "userEmail", "userId" as User, UserId nodrop
| json field=operator "email", "sourceIp", "interface" as UnlockedBy, UnlockedByIp , Interface nodrop
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and UserIp matches "{{UserIp}}" 
|count by EventName, EventTime, AccountId, User, UserId, UnlockedBy, UnlockedByIp, Interface
| sort by EventTime

| where EventName in ("UserLoggedOut", "UserLoggedIn", "UserLockedOut", "UserUnlocked", "UserLoginTimedOut") 
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and UserIp matches "{{UserIp}}" 
| count as Count by EventName
| fillmissing values("UserLoggedOut", "UserLoggedIn", "UserLockedOut", "UserUnlocked", "UserLoginTimedOut") in EventName 
| compare timeshift 1d as Shift_1d

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=userSessions UserLoggedIn

| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and UserIp matches "{{UserIp}}" 
|count as Count by AuthenticationSource

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=userSessions (UserLoggedOut OR UserLoggedIn OR UserLockedOut OR UserUnlocked OR UserLoginTimedOut)
| json "eventName", "eventTime", "accountId", "userSession.sourceIp" as EventName, EventTime, AccountId, UserIp nodrop
| json "userSession.email", "userSession.id" as LoginUser, LoginUserId nodrop
| json "sessionIdentity.userEmail", "sessionIdentity.userId" as LogoutUser, LogoutUserId nodrop
| json "userIdentity.userEmail", "userIdentity.userId" as LockedUser, LockedUserId nodrop
| json "authenticationSource" as AuthenticationSource nodrop
| if(isEmpty(LoginUser), if(isEmpty(LogoutUser), if(isEmpty(LockedUser), "", LockedUser),LogoutUser), LoginUser) as User
| if(isEmpty(LoginUserId), if(isEmpty(LogoutUserId), if(isEmpty(LockedUserId), "", LockedUserId),LogoutUserId), LoginUserId) as UserId
| _sourceHost as UserIp
| where EventName in ("UserLoggedOut", "UserLoggedIn", "UserLockedOut", "UserUnlocked", "UserLoginTimedOut") 
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and UserIp matches "{{UserIp}}" 
|count by EventName, EventTime, User, UserId, UserIp, AuthenticationSource
| sort by EventTime
| fields - _count, UserId
| limit 100

_index=sumologic_audit_events _sourceCategory=userSessions (UserLoggedOut OR UserLoggedIn OR UserLoginTimedOut)

| where EventName in ("UserLoggedOut","UserLoggedIn","UserLoginTimedOut")
| where EventName matches "{{EventName}}" and UserIp matches "{{UserIp}}" 
| if(isNull(LoginUserId), LogoutUserID, LoginUserId) as UserId
| withtime EventName
| most_recent(EventName_withtime) as LastEvent by UserId
| where UserId!="-"
| where LastEvent matches "UserLoggedIn"
| count as Count by LastEvent
| fillmissing values("UserLoggedIn") in LastEvent

dashboard: Enterprise Search Audit - Queries Characteristics and Opportunities to Improve

queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
//(query_type="Scheduled Search" or query_type="Interactive Dashboard" or query_type="Search API")
| if (query_type == "View Maintenance", "Scheduled Views", query_type) as query_type
| count as qCount, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scanned by query,user_name,query_type
| toLowerCase(query) as queryLower 
| parse regex field=queryLower "^(?<scope_section_raw>[^\|]+)" nodrop 
| replace(scope_section_raw," ","") as scope_section | if (scope_section="" or isNull(scope_section) or scope_section="*",1, 0) as  select_all
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<meta>sourcecategory|sourcehost|collector|source|sourcename)\s*="  nodrop  | if (meta!="",1,0) as use_meta
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<idx>view|index)\s*="  nodrop  | if (idx!="",1,0) as use_idx
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "(?:^|\s+)(?<kfield>\w+)\s*="  nodrop  | if (kfield!="" and !(kfield in ("sourcecategory","collector","index","view","source","sourcehost","sourcename")),1,0) as use_field
| 0 as use_kw | parse regex field=scope_section_raw "(?:^|\s+)(?<first>\"[^\"]+\"|\'[^\']+\'|[\w\"\']+)(?<bridge>\s*=\s*|\s+|$)(?<second>\w+|$)" multi nodrop | if ( !(bridge matches "*=*") and select_all!=1,1,use_kw) as use_kw
| max(use_kw) as use_kw, max(use_field) as use_field, max(use_meta) as use_meta, max(use_idx) as use_idx, max(qCount) as queries, max(scanned) as scanned_bytes by query,user_name, query_type 
| (scanned_bytes/1Gi) as scanned_gbytes | fields -scanned_bytes
| (use_kw+use_field+use_meta+use_idx) as optimizations
| where optimizations =0
| fields -use_kw,use_field,use_idx,optimizations,use_meta
| sort by scanned_gbytes

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query query_type="Interactive Dashboard"
| sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scanned_bytes, sum(data_retrieved_bytes) as retrieved_bytes by user_name, query, session_id, execution_duration_ms 
| round(execution_duration_ms/1000) as duration_seconds 
| toLowerCase(query) as queryLower 
| parse regex field=queryLower "^(?<scope_section_raw>[^\|]+)" nodrop 
| replace(scope_section_raw," ","") as scope_section 
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<meta>sourcecategory|sourcehost|collector|source|sourcename)\s*="  nodrop
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<idx>view|index)\s*="  nodrop  
| where ( isEmpty(idx) AND isEmpty(meta))
| fields -queryLower,session_id,execution_duration_ms, scope_section_raw,_some_matched, scope_section,meta,idx

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
| count as queries by query
| toLowerCase(query) as queryLower 
| parse regex field=queryLower "^(?<scope_section_raw>[^\|]+)" nodrop 
| replace(scope_section_raw," ","") as scope_section | if (scope_section="" or isNull(scope_section) or scope_section="*",1, 0) as  select_all
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<meta>sourcecategory|sourcehost|collector|source|sourcename)\s*="  nodrop  | if (meta!="",1,0) as use_meta
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<idx>view|index)\s*="  nodrop  | if (idx!="",1,0) as use_idx
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "(?:^|\s+)(?<kfield>\w+)\s*="  nodrop  | if (kfield!="" and !(kfield in ("sourcecategory","collector","index","view","source","sourcehost","sourcename")),1,0) as use_field
| 0 as use_kw | parse regex field=scope_section_raw "(?:^|\s+)(?<first>\"[^\"]+\"|\'[^\']+\'|[\w\"\']+)(?<bridge>\s*=\s*|\s+|$)(?<second>\w+|$)" multi nodrop | if ( !(bridge matches "*=*") and select_all!=1,1,use_kw) as use_kw
| max(use_kw) as use_kw, max(use_field) as use_field, max(use_meta) as use_meta, max(use_idx) as use_idx, max(queries) as queries by query
| (use_kw+use_field+use_meta+use_idx) as optimizations
| format("%d Optimizations",int(optimizations)) as OptimizationsStr
//| where optimizationsStr matches "4*" 
| sum(queries) as queries by optimizationsStr | sort by optimizationsStr

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query
//| "_sourcecategory=cqsplitter DefaultPerCustomerLagTracker \"current lag\" " as query 
| count as qCount, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scanned by query,user_name
| toLowerCase(query) as queryLower 
| parse regex field=queryLower "^(?<scope_section_raw>[^\|]+)" nodrop 
| replace(scope_section_raw," ","") as scope_section | if (scope_section="" or isNull(scope_section) or scope_section="*",1, 0) as  select_all
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<meta>sourcecategory|sourcehost|collector|source|sourcename)\s*="  nodrop  | if (meta!="",1,0) as use_meta
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<idx>view|index)\s*="  nodrop  | if (idx!="",1,0) as use_idx
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "(?:^|\s+)(?<kfield>\w+)\s*="  nodrop  | if (kfield!="" and !(kfield in ("sourcecategory","collector","index","view","source","sourcehost","sourcename")),1,0) as use_field
| 0 as use_kw | parse regex field=scope_section_raw "(?:^|\s+)(?<first>\"[^\"]+\"|\'[^\']+\'|[\w\"\']+)(?<bridge>\s*=\s*|\s+|$)(?<second>\w+|$)" multi nodrop | if ( !(bridge matches "*=*") and select_all!=1,1,use_kw) as use_kw
| max(use_kw) as use_kw, max(use_field) as use_field, max(use_meta) as use_meta, max(use_idx) as use_idx, max(qCount) as qCount, max(scanned) as scanned by query,user_name 
| scanned/1Gi as scanned
| (use_kw+use_field+use_meta+use_idx) as optimizations
| format("%d Optimizations",int(optimizations)) as %"Optimization Techniques"
// To look for queries WITH a given number of optimizations, uncomment and modify the following line and comment the last line
//| where optimizationsStr matches "0*" 
| sum(qCount) as queries, sum(scanned) as scanned_in_GB by %"Optimization Techniques" 
| total(queries) as total_queries | total(scanned_in_gb) as total_scanned_in_gb 
| toInt((queries/total_queries)*100) as queries_pct | toInt((scanned_in_gb/total_scanned_in_gb)*100) as scanned_pct 
| format("%.2f",scanned_in_gb) as scanned_in_gb
| fields -total_queries,total_scanned_in_gb
| sort by %"Optimization Techniques"

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query query_type="Scheduled Search"
| sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scanned_bytes, sum(data_retrieved_bytes) as retrieved_bytes by user_name, query, session_id, execution_duration_ms 
| round(execution_duration_ms/1000) as duration_seconds 
| toLowerCase(query) as queryLower 
| parse regex field=queryLower "^(?<scope_section_raw>[^\|]+)" nodrop 
| replace(scope_section_raw," ","") as scope_section 
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<meta>sourcecategory|sourcehost|collector|source|sourcename)\s*="  nodrop
| parse regex field=scope_section_raw "_(?<idx>view|index)\s*="  nodrop  
| where ( isEmpty(idx) AND isEmpty(meta) )
| fields -queryLower,session_id,execution_duration_ms, scope_section_raw,_some_matched, scope_section,meta,idx

dashboard: Content items with scan volume > 10x of avg daily ingest of last 30 days

queries.panelTitle: Content items with scan volume > 10x of avg daily ingest of last 30 days
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
| "dummy" as dummy // this field is only used to artificially link the parent query and subquery
| where [subquery from=(-30d) to=(-1d):
              // this subquery saves the average daily ingest for the org to a lookup table
              _index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=view_and_tier_volume 
              | parse regex "\"field\":\"(?<field>.*?)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<tier>.*?)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<size>.*?)," multi
              | where tier in ("Continuous", "Infrequent", "Frequent", "Flex")  
              | timeslice 1d 
              | where (queryStartTime() < _timeslice and queryEndTime() > __timeslice_end) // this eliminates partial time slices
              | sum(size) as dailyIngest by _timeslice
              | avg(dailyIngest) as avgDailyIngest
              | round(avgDailyIngest,0) as avgDailyIngest
              // create artificial primary key for later use as lookup in parent query
              | 0 as pkey
              // save the avgDailyIngest and primary key to legacy lookup table
              | save /avgDailyIngest2
              // create dummy field to link to parent query
              | "dummy" as dummy
              | compose dummy]
// break out the scan volume for each query by tier
| parse regex field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "\"(?<tier>[a-zA-Z]+)\" \: (?<tier_scanned_bytes>[0-9]+)" multi nodrop
| sum(tier_scanned_bytes) as avgDailyScanned by tier, query_type, content_name, content_identifier
| if (query_type == "View Maintenance", "Scheduled Views", query_type) as query_type
| 0 as pkey
| lookup avgDailyIngest from /avgDailyIngest2 on  pkey=pkey
| fields -pkey
// calculate the scan of each query to the overall ingest
| round(100*avgDailyScanned/avgDailyIngest,0) as percent_scan_of_ingest
| where percent_scan_of_ingest > 1000
| sort percent_scan_of_ingest

_index=sumologic_volume
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as sourcecategory, dataTier, bytes, count
| where _sourceCategory matches "collector_and_tier_volume"  and dataTier matches "Flex"
| avg(bytes)
| {{Subscribed_Log_Data_Scan_Capacity}} as %"DailyLogDataScanCapacity" // This is account contract based value. Customize this value. Can be found in Administration > Account > Account Overview
| fields %"DailyLogDataScanCapacity"

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query (analytics_tier="Flex")  !(status_message="Query Failed")	
| fields data_scanned_bytes, query, is_aggregate, query_type, remote_ip, retrieved_message_count, scanned_message_count, scanned_partition_count, session_id, status_message, user_name
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB
| timeslice 1d
| sum (sizeInGB) as total_data_scanned_GB by _timeslice
| avg(total_data_scanned_GB) as %"AvgLogDataScanPerDay"

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query (analytics_tier="Flex")  !(status_message="Query Failed")	
| fields data_scanned_bytes, query, is_aggregate, query_type, remote_ip, retrieved_message_count, scanned_message_count, scanned_partition_count, session_id, status_message, user_name
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB
| timeslice 1d
| sum (sizeInGB) as total_data_scanned_GB by _timeslice
| avg(total_data_scanned_GB) as %"AvgLogDataScanPerDay"
//| sort by total_data_scanned_GB
//| ingest_gbytes / duration_in_day as %"AvgLogIngestPerDay"

queries.panelTitle: Top Ingest Spikes for Top 5 Collectors Per Day
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as collector, dataTier, bytes, count
| where _sourceCategory matches "collector_and_tier_volume" and dataTier="Flex"
| timeslice 1d
| bytes/1024/1024/1024 as gbytes 
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by _timeslice, collector
| compare with timeshift 1d
| sort _timeslice desc, gbytes desc
| 1 as rownum
| accum rownum by _timeslice
| where _accum <= 5 // limit by this
| fields _timeslice, gbytes, gbytes_1d, collector
| if (!(isNull(gbytes_1d)), ((gbytes - gbytes_1d) / gbytes_1d) * 100, gbytes * 100) as percent_diff
| if (isNull(gbytes_1d), 0, gbytes_1d) as gbytes_1d
| where percent_diff > 0
| sort percent_diff
| limit 25
| fields _timeslice, collector, percent_diff, gbytes, gbytes_1d

queries.panelTitle: Daily Ingest Vs Average Daily Ingest Capacity
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume datapoints
| where _sourceCategory matches "{{MetricsSources}}"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"dataPoints\"\:(?<datapoints>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 1d
| sum(datapoints) as daily_ingest_datapoints by _timeslice
| {{Subscribed_Metric_DPM_Ingest_Capacity}} as DPM_Capacity // This is account contract based value. Customize this value. Can be found in Administration > Account > Account Overview
| DPM_Capacity * 60 * 24 as DataPoint_Capacity // Set this calculated value through gear icon for "Colors by Value Range..."
| fields -DPM_Capacity

_index=sumologic_volume datapoints
| where _sourceCategory="collector_metrics_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"dataPoints\"\:(?<datapoints>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 1h
| sum(datapoints) as datapoints by _timeslice
| sort by _timeslice asc 
| smooth datapoints as moving_avg | datapoints as curr_hrs_datapoints
| 70 as spikePercent
| where curr_hrs_datapoints >= (1 + spikePercent / 100) * moving_avg
| fields -spikePercent

_index=sumologic_volume datapoints
| where _sourceCategory="collector_metrics_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"dataPoints\"\:(?<datapoints>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 1h
| sum(datapoints) as curr_hrs_datapoints by _timeslice
| sort by _timeslice asc 
| diff curr_hrs_datapoints
| where !isNull(_diff)
| (_diff+curr_hrs_datapoints) as prev_hrs_datapoints
| ((_diff / curr_hrs_datapoints) * 100) as pct_incr
| 50 as spikePercent
| where (-1 * pct_incr) > spikePercent
| abs(pct_incr) as pct_incr
| fields _timeslice, curr_hrs_datapoints, prev_hrs_datapoints, pct_incr

_index=sumologic_volume dataPoints
| where _sourceCategory="collector_metrics_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"dataPoints\"\:(?<datapoints>\d+)\}" multi
| sum(datapoints) as datapoints
| datapoints/1000000 as MillionDataPoints
| fields MillionDataPoints

_index=sumologic_volume dataPoints
| where _sourceCategory="collector_metrics_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"dataPoints\"\:(?<datapoints>\d+)\}" multi

| datapoints/1000/1000 as MillionDataPoints
| ((queryEndTime() - queryStartTime())/(1000*60)) as duration_in_min
| MillionDataPoints / duration_in_min as %"DPM" 
| fields %"DPM"

_index=sumologic_volume datapoints
| where _sourceCategory matches"{{MetricsSources}}"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"dataPoints\"\:(?<datapoints>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 5m
| sum(datapoints) as daily_ingest_datapoints by _timeslice
| compare timeshift 1d

| top 5 collector by %"DPM"

_index=sumologic_volume 
| where _sourceCategory matches"{{Tracingsources}}"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"billedBytes\"\:(?<billedBytes>\d+)\,\"spansCount\"\:(?<spansCount>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 6h
|sum({{Unit}}) as %"{{Unit}}" by _timeslice
| predict %"{{Unit}}" by 6h model=ar, forecast=20

_index=sumologic_volume 
| where _sourceCategory="collector_tracing_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"billedBytes\"\:(?<billedBytes>\d+)\,\"spansCount\"\:(?<spansCount>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 1h
|sum({{Unit}}) as %"{{Unit}}" by _timeslice
| sort by _timeslice asc 
| smooth %"{{Unit}}"  as moving_avg | %"{{Unit}}"  as %"curr_hrs_{{Unit}}"
| 70 as spikePercent
| where %"curr_hrs_{{Unit}}" >= (1 + spikePercent / 100) * moving_avg
| fields -spikePercent

_index=sumologic_volume 
| where _sourceCategory="collector_tracing_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"billedBytes\"\:(?<billedBytes>\d+)\,\"spansCount\"\:(?<spansCount>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 1h
|sum({{Unit}}) as %"curr_hrs_{{Unit}}" by _timeslice
| sort by _timeslice asc 
| diff %"curr_hrs_{{Unit}}"
| where !isNull(_diff)
| (_diff+%"curr_hrs_{{Unit}}") as %"prev_hrs_{{Unit}}"
| ((_diff / %"curr_hrs_{{Unit}}") * 100) as pct_incr
| 50 as spikePercent
| where (-1 * pct_incr) > spikePercent
| abs(pct_incr) as pct_incr
| fields _timeslice, %"curr_hrs_{{Unit}}", %"prev_hrs_{{Unit}}", pct_incr

_index=sumologic_volume 
| where _sourceCategory="sourcename_tracing_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<sourceName>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"billedBytes\"\:(?<billedBytes>\d+)\,\"spansCount\"\:(?<spansCount>\d+)\}" multi
|sum({{Unit}}) as %"{{Unit}}" by sourceName
| ((queryEndTime() - queryStartTime())/(1000*60)) as duration_in_min
| %"{{Unit}}" / duration_in_min as % "{{Unit}} per minute"
| top 5 sourceName by % "{{Unit}} per minute"

_index=sumologic_volume 
| where _sourceCategory="service_tracing_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<source>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"billedBytes\"\:(?<billedBytes>\d+)\,\"spansCount\"\:(?<spansCount>\d+)\}" multi
|sum({{Unit}}) as %"{{Unit}}" by source
| ((queryEndTime() - queryStartTime())/(1000*60)) as duration_in_min
| %"{{Unit}}" / duration_in_min as % "{{Unit}} per minute"
| top 5 source by % "{{Unit}} per minute"

queries.panelTitle: Ingest Today vs Yesterday of {{Tracingsources}}  by {{Unit}}
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume 
| where _sourceCategory matches "{{Tracingsources}}"
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"billedBytes\"\:(?<billedBytes>\d+)\,\"spansCount\"\:(?<spansCount>\d+)\}" multi
| timeslice 5m
|sum({{Unit}}) as %"{{Unit}}" by _timeslice
| compare timeshift 1d

dashboard: Org's total Credits value exceeded input Credit

queries.panelTitle: Org's total Credits value exceeded input Credit
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query (analytics_tier="flex")  !(status_message="Query Failed")	
| fields data_scanned_bytes, query, is_aggregate, query_type, remote_ip, retrieved_message_count, scanned_message_count, scanned_partition_count, session_id, status_message, user_name
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB
| sizeInGB * {{credits_consumed_factor}} as credits_consumed
| sum (credits_consumed) as total_credits_consumed
| where total_credits_consumed >= {{Total_Credits_Consumed}}

queries.panelTitle: Geo Location of Users executing queries
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  !(user_name=*sumologic.com)
| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as data_scanned_bytes| fields data_scanned_bytes, query, is_aggregate, query_type, remote_ip, retrieved_message_count, scanned_message_count, scanned_partition_count, session_id, status_message, user_name
| if (query_type == "View Maintenance", "Scheduled Views", query_type) as query_type
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Ti as sizeInTB
| sizeInTB * 4 as cost_in_usd
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip = remote_ip
|where if ("{{user_name}}" = "*", true, user_name matches "{{user_name}}") AND if ("{{session_id}}" = "*", true, session_id matches "{{session_id}}") AND if ("{{is_aggregate}}" = "*", true, toString(is_aggregate) matches "{{is_aggregate}}") AND if ("{{status_message}}" = "*", true, status_message matches "{{status_message}}") AND if ("{{query}}" = "*", true, query matches "{{query}}") AND if ("{{query_type}}" = "*", true, query_type matches "{{query_type}}")
|count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| sort _count

queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  !(user_name=*sumologic.com) !(status_message="Query Failed")	
| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as data_scanned_bytes
| fields data_scanned_bytes, query, is_aggregate, query_type, remote_ip, retrieved_message_count, scanned_message_count, scanned_partition_count, session_id, status_message, user_name
| if (query_type == "View Maintenance", "Scheduled Views", query_type) as query_type
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB
| timeslice 1d
|where if ("{{user_name}}" = "*", true, user_name matches "{{user_name}}") AND if ("{{session_id}}" = "*", true, session_id matches "{{session_id}}") AND if ("{{is_aggregate}}" = "*", true, toString(is_aggregate) matches "{{is_aggregate}}")  AND if ("{{status_message}}" = "*", true, status_message matches "{{status_message}}") AND if ("{{query}}" = "*", true, query matches "{{query}}") AND if ("{{query_type}}" = "*", true, query_type matches "{{query_type}}")
|sum (sizeInGB) as total_data_scanned_GB by  _timeslice, user_name 
| where if ("{{total_data_scanned_GB}}" = "0", true, total_data_scanned_GB > {{total_data_scanned_GB}})
| transpose row _timeslice column user_name

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  !(user_name=*sumologic.com) !(status_message="Query Failed")	
| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as data_scanned_bytes

| if (query_type == "View Maintenance", "Scheduled Views", query_type) as query_type
| query_end_time - query_start_time as query_time_range_hrs
| query_time_range_hrs / 3600000 as query_time_range_hrs
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB
|where if ("{{query_time_range_hrs}}" = "0", true, query_time_range_hrs > {{query_time_range_hrs}}) AND if ("{{user_name}}" = "*", true, user_name matches "{{user_name}}") AND if ("{{session_id}}" = "*", true, session_id matches "{{session_id}}") AND if ("{{is_aggregate}}" = "*", true, toString(is_aggregate) matches "{{is_aggregate}}") AND if ("{{status_message}}" = "*", true, status_message matches "{{status_message}}") AND if ("{{query}}" = "*", true, query matches "{{query}}") AND if ("{{query_type}}" = "*", true, query_type matches "{{query_type}}")
|count (query) as query_count, sum(sizeInGB) as total_data_scanned_GB by query
| where if ("{{total_data_scanned_GB}}" = "0", true, total_data_scanned_GB > {{total_data_scanned_GB}})
| total_data_scanned_GB/query_count as %"Average Data Scanned per Query"

| sort by total_data_scanned_GB

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  !(user_name=*sumologic.com) !(status_message="Query Failed")

| if (query_type == "View Maintenance", "Scheduled Views", query_type) as query_type
| query_end_time - query_start_time as query_time_range_hrs
| query_time_range_hrs / 3600000 as query_time_range_hrs
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB

|sum(sizeInGB) as total_data_scanned_GB by query, is_aggregate, query_type, status_message, user_name, session_id, query_time_range_hrs

(_index=sumologic_volume) _sourcecategory=sourcecategory_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}" multi

| sum(count) as events,sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value,_sourcecategory
//| sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value,_timeslice
| bytes /1024/1024/1024 as gb | sort gb
| parse field=_sourcecategory "*_and_tier_volume" as dimension 
| fields -_sourcecategory,_some_matched,bytes

// remove long categories
| if (length(value) > 35,concat(substring(value,0,35),"..."),value) as value 
| count as categories,sum(events) as events,sum(gb) as gbytes by dimension,value,dataTier
| total gbytes as tgb 
| total gbytes as tgbs by value,datatier
| tgbs / tgb as fraction

// *** THIS LINE rolls up small sources into 'other' ***
| if(( fraction * 100 )> .01,value,"other" ) as value
| fraction * 100 as percent
//| bytes / 1024/1024/1024 as gb
| if (datatier="Frequent",gbytes * 9,gbytes * 20) as credits
| if (datatier="Infrequent",gbytes * .4,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="CSE",gbytes * 25,credits) as credits
|sum(categories) as categories, sum(credits) as credits, sum(events) as events,sum(gbytes) as gbytes, sum(percent) as pct_GB 
| credits/gbytes as %"cr/gb" 
| avg(%"cr/gb") as %"cr/gb"

(_index=sumologic_volume) _sourcecategory=sourcecategory_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}" multi

| sum(count) as events,sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value,_sourcecategory
//| sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value,_timeslice
| bytes /1024/1024/1024 as gb | sort gb
| parse field=_sourcecategory "*_and_tier_volume" as dimension 
| fields -_sourcecategory,_some_matched,bytes

// remove long categories
| if (length(value) > 35,concat(substring(value,0,35),"..."),value) as value 
| count as categories,sum(events) as events,sum(gb) as gbytes by dimension,value,dataTier
| total gbytes as tgb 
| total gbytes as tgbs by value,datatier
| tgbs / tgb as fraction

// *** THIS LINE rolls up small sources into 'other' ***
| if(( fraction * 100 )> .01,value,"other" ) as value
| fraction * 100 as percent
//| bytes / 1024/1024/1024 as gb
| if (datatier="Frequent",gbytes * 9,gbytes * 20) as credits
| if (datatier="Infrequent",gbytes * .4,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="CSE",gbytes * 25,credits) as credits
|sum(categories) as categories, sum(credits) as credits, sum(events) as events,sum(gbytes) as gbytes, sum(percent) as pct_GB by datatier,dimension,value
| credits/gbytes as %"cr/gb"
| sort credits
| total credits as tc | 100 * (credits/tc) as pct_cr | fields -tc

(_index=sumologic_volume) _sourcecategory=sourcecategory_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}" multi
| where tolowercase(value) matches tolowercase("*")

| timeslice by 1d

(_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query) not query_type=sumo*
//user_name=* query=* query_type=* analytics_tier=*
//| where query matches /^./
| if( query matches "*_source*" OR query matches "*_collector*" OR "*_sourceCategory*" OR query matches "*_sourceName*"  OR query matches "*_sourceHost*" OR query matches "*_view*|*" OR query matches "*_index*", 1, 0 ) as metadata_usage
| if( query matches "*parse*" OR query matches "*json*" OR query matches "*keyvalue*" OR query matches "*kv*" OR query matches "*extract*" OR query matches "*csv*", 1, 0 ) as parsing
| if( query matches "*_timeslice*", 1, 0 ) as trending
| if( query matches "*summarize*" OR query matches "*logreduce*" OR query matches "*logcompare*", 1, 0 ) as signature_recognition
| if( query matches "*backshift*" OR query matches "*| compare*" OR query matches "*|compare*", 1, 0 ) as time_series_analyses
| if( query matches "*| transaction*" OR query matches "*|transaction*" OR query matches "*sessionize*" OR query matches "*merge*"  OR query matches "*| join*" OR query matches "*|join*", 1, 0 ) as event_correlation
| if( query matches "*outlier*" OR query matches "*predict*", 1, 0 ) as outlier_detection
| if( query matches "*sumo://threat/cs*" or query matches "*threatip*", 1, 0 ) as threat_intel 
| count as searches, sum(metadata_usage) as metadata_usage, sum(parsing) as parsing,   sum(trending) as trending, sum(signature_recognition) as signature_recognition, sum(time_series_analyses) as time_series_analyses, sum(event_correlation) as event_correlation, sum(outlier_detection) as outlier_detection, sum(threat_intel) as threat_intel by user_name 
| sort searches

queries.panelTitle: Lambda Logs Events Likely to Be Errors
queries.query:
_sourceCategory=*cloudwatch* accountid= {{accountid}} account = {{account}} functionname={{functionname}}
(err* or warn* or crit* or fatal or fail*)
//| parse field=logstream "*/[*]*" as logstreamDate, version, logstreamID
//
| parse regex  "^(?<time>\d[^\t]*)\t(?<RequestId>[^\t]*)\t(?<errorObj>.*)" nodrop | json field=errorObj "errorMessage" nodrop
| parse regex  "^(?<time>\d+\/\d+\/\d+\s+\d+:\d+:\d+):(?<logLevel>ERROR|CRITICAL):(?<errorMsg>.*)" nodrop 
| parse regex  "^\[(?<logLevel>ERROR|CRITICAL)]\s(?<errorMsg>.*)" nodrop
| parse regex "^\[(?<logLevel>ERROR|CRITICAL)]\t(?<time>\d[^\t]*)\t(?<RequestId>[^\t]*)\t(?<errorMsg>.*)" nodrop
| parse regex "^(?<logLevel>ERROR|CRITICAL) \| (?<time>.*) \| (?<thread>.*) \| (?<component>.*) \| (?<errorMsg>.*)" nodrop
| parse regex  "(?<errorMsg>.*HTTPError.*)" nodrop
| if (isEmpty(errorMessage), errorMsg, errorMessage) as errorMessage
| where !isEmpty(errorMessage) | substring(errormessage,0,150) as errormessage
| parse regex field=functionname "^(?<function>(?:[^_-]+[_-]*){1,3})" nodrop | if (isempty(function),functionname,function) as function
| if(length(functionname) > length(function),concat(function,"*"),function) as function
| count as num_errors by accountid,account,errorMessage, function | sort num_errors | limit 100
//| top 30 errorMessage, functionname by num_errors desc, errorMessage asc, functionname asc, account asc

_sourceCategory=*cloudtrail* errorcode = *
{{{keywords}}}

{{{keywords}}}

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes _sourceCategory="collector_volume" 
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>(?:[^\"]+)|(?:\"\"))\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi 
//| sort _messagetime 
| max(_messagetime) as MostRecent, sum(bytes) as TotalVolumeBytes by collector 
| formatDate(tolong(MostRecent),"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss") as MostRecentTime 
| toMillis(now()) as currentTime 
| formatDate(fromMillis(currentTime),"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss") as SearchTime 
| (currentTime-MostRecent) / 1000 / 60 as mins_since_last_logs 
| fields -mostrecent, currenttime,SearchTime
|floor(mins_since_last_logs) as mins_since_last_logs
//| format ("%s Has not collected data in the past %s minutes", collector,mins_since_last_logs) as message
| sort mins_since_last_logs
// we set a threshold on this line
| where mins_since_last_logs >= 15

queries.panelTitle: Large Increases in Collection (10% increase, .5% total ingest)
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes _sourcecategory="collector_volume" 
| parse regex "\"(?<collector>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi 
| bytes/1024/1024/1024 as gbytes 
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by collector 
| where !(collector matches "*_volume") 
| compare timeshift -14d 
| if(isNull(gbytes_14d), 0, gbytes_14d) as gbytes_14d 
| if (isnull(gbytes),0,gbytes) as gbytes
| ((gbytes - gbytes_14d) / gbytes) * 100 as pct_increase
| total gbytes  
| (gbytes / _total) * 100 as ingest_weight
| round(ingest_weight) as ingest_weight
| round(pct_increase) as pct_increase
| round(gbytes / 1024) as mb
| round(gbytes_14d / 1024) as mb_baseline 
| where  pct_increase > 10 and ingest_weight > .5 and ( mb > 100 or mb_baseline > 100)
//update pct_increase and/or weight value to adjust alert sensitivity
| concat (round(pct_increase,1),"% more ingest was: ",round(mb_baseline),"MB now: ",round(mb),"MB pct of total:",round(ingest_weight,1)) as comment
| last(pct_increase) by collector,comment

queries.panelTitle: Large Decreases in Collection (10% drop, .5% total ingest, >100mb) vs 14d ago

| if(isNull(gbytes_14d), 0, gbytes_14d) as gbytes_14d

| ((gbytes - gbytes_14d) / gbytes) * 100 as pct_increase
| total gbytes  
| (gbytes / _total) * 100 as ingest_weight
| round(ingest_weight) as ingest_weight
| round(pct_increase) as pct_increase
| round(gbytes / 1024) as mb

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes _sourcecategory="collector_volume"

queries.panelTitle: Daily Ingest Credits With Storage Estimate
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=view_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "(?<row>\{\"[^\}]+\})" multi
// too slow: parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}" multi
// slower | json field=row "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes"  as value,datatier,sizeinbytes 
| parse field=row "{\"field\":\"*\",\"dataTier\":\"*\",\"sizeInBytes\":*,\"count\":*}" as value,datatier,sizeinbytes,count
| where sizeinbytes > 0
| timeslice by 1d
//| sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value

| sum(sizeInBytes) as sizeInBytes by datatier, value,_timeslice
| sizeInBytes / 1024/1024/1024 as gb
| if (datatier="Frequent",gb * 9,gb * 20) as credits
| if (datatier="Infrequent",gb * .4,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="CSE",gb * 25,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="Security",gb * 0,credits) as credits
| sum(credits) as credits by datatier,_timeslice

// these will estimate storage credits over lifetime so we get a storage estimate

| 0.0067 as cr_storage
| 0.0015 as cr_infreq_storage
| if (datatier="Infrequent", (credits / .4) *  {{retention_days_infr}} * cr_infreq_storage ,0 ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="Continuous", (credits / 20) *  {{retention_days}} * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="Frequent", (credits / 20) *  {{retention_days}} * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="CSE", (credits / 25) *  {{retention_days}} * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage

// it's unlikely to ever fully use retention container over long term due to growth
// if you ingest is very flat or shorter retention use a flatter ratio number
| credits_storage * {{storage_estimate_factor}} as credits_storage

// now we need to repack the columsn to support final graph output
| if(datatier="Continuous",credits,0) as cr_cont
| if(datatier="Frequent",credits,0) as cr_frequent
| if(datatier="Infrequent",credits,0) as cr_infrequent
| if(datatier="CSE",credits,0) as cr_CSE

| sum(cr_cont) as continuous, sum(cr_frequent) as frequent, sum(cr_infrequent) as infrequent,sum(cr_CSE) as CSE, sum(credits_storage) as %"storage (estimate)"  by _timeslice
| {{my_annual_credits}} / {{credit_term_days}} as plan
| sort _timeslice asc | continuous + frequent + infrequent + cse + %"storage (estimate)" as total_credits | smooth total_credits as trend | fields -total_credits

queries.panelTitle: Ingestion Indexes, Tiers, GB and Credits
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=view_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "(?<row>\{\"[^\}]+\})" multi
// too slow: parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}" multi
// slower | json field=row "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes"  as value,datatier,sizeinbytes 
| parse field=row "{\"field\":\"*\",\"dataTier\":\"*\",\"sizeInBytes\":*,\"count\":*}" as value,datatier,sizeinbytes,count
| where sizeinbytes > 0
//| timeslice by 1d
//| sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value
| sizeInBytes / 1024/1024/1024 as gb
| value as index
| sum(gb) as gb by datatier, index

| if (datatier="Frequent",gb * 9,gb * 20) as credits
| if (datatier="Infrequent",gb * .4,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="CSE",gb * 25,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="Security",gb * 0,credits) as credits
| sum(gb) as gb,sum(credits) as credits by datatier,index
| ( queryendtime() - querystarttime() ) / ( 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as query_days
| credits / query_days as %"cr/day" // 

| {{my_annual_credits}} / {{credit_term_days}} as plan
| num(( %"cr/day"/plan ) * 100) as pct_plan | sort credits | fields -plan,query_days

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  
analytics_tier=*infrequent*
not user_name=*sumosupport*

| {{my_annual_credits}} / {{credit_term_days}} as plan

_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=view_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "(?<row>\{\"[^\}]+\})" multi
// too slow: parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}" multi
// slower | json field=row "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes"  as value,datatier,sizeinbytes 
| parse field=row "{\"field\":\"*\",\"dataTier\":\"*\",\"sizeInBytes\":*,\"count\":*}" as value,datatier,sizeinbytes,count

//| sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value

| sum(gb) as gb by datatier //,_timeslice

| if (datatier="Frequent",gb * 9,gb * 20) as credits
| if (datatier="Infrequent",gb * .4,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="CSE",gb * 25,credits) as credits
| if (datatier="Security",gb * 0,credits) as credits
| sum(credits) as credits by datatier

// these will estimate storage credits over lifetime so we get a storage estimate
//
| 390 as retention_days
| 390 as infr_retention_days
| 0.0067 as cr_storage
|  0.0015 as cr_infreq_storage
| if (datatier="Infrequent", (credits / .4) *  infr_retention_days * cr_infreq_storage ,0 ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="Continuous", (credits / 20) *  retention_days * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="Frequent", (credits / 20) *  retention_days * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage
| if (datatier="CSE", (credits / 25) *  retention_days * cr_storage ,credits_storage ) as credits_storage

// it's unlikely to ever fully use retention container over long term due to growth
// if you ingest is very flat or shorter retention use a flatter ratio number
| credits_storage * .55 as credits_storage

// now we need to repack the columsn to support final graph output
| if(datatier="Continuous",credits,0) as cr_cont
| if(datatier="Frequent",credits,0) as cr_frequent
| if(datatier="Infrequent",credits,0) as cr_infrequent
| if(datatier="CSE",credits,0) as cr_CSE

| sum(credits) as credits, sum(credits_storage) as %"storage (estimate)"  // by _timeslice
| credits + %"storage (estimate)" as daily_credits_estimate | sum(daily_credits_estimate) as credits
| ( queryendtime() - querystarttime() ) / ( 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as query_days
| credits / query_days as %"cr/day" // 
| {{my_annual_credits}} / {{credit_term_days}} as plan
| ( %"cr/day"/plan ) * 100 as pct_plan
| fields -plan,query_days

dashboard: Alert - Abnormal rate of credits consumption

queries.panelTitle: Alert - Abnormal rate of credits consumption
queries.query:
/* 
Schedule this alert so you are notified when credits usage is outside of normal averages
Since it uses time compare you can apply to any time range. Using longer times such as -24h every 24h will produce less sensitive alerts.
*/
_view=credits_usage_hourly_v1 
| sum(credits) as credits by uom
| compare with timeshift 1d 7 avg
| if(isnull(credits),0,credits) as credits
| (( credits - credits_7d_avg) / credits_7d_avg) * 100 as change_percent
| ( credits - credits_7d_avg)  as change

/* 
Thresholds
*/

| 0 as credits_minimum
//| -50 as under
| 50 as over
//| if (abs(change) >= credits_minimum and (change_percent < under or change_percent > over),"ALERT Abnormal Credits Consumption Rate","OK") as status
| if (abs(change) >= credits_minimum and (change_percent > over),"ALERT Abnormal Credits Consumption Rate","OK") as status

| where status !="OK"
| fields -over,credits_minimum

dashboard: Alert - Daily credits trend exceeds plan size.

queries.panelTitle: Alert - Daily credits trend exceeds plan size.
queries.query:
/*
 Schedule this search daily to alert if your average usage over say -7d is over plan
Set schedule to daily for -7d for example.
For trigger set to where event count > 0
*/

cat /shared/lookups/credits_report
| where _timeslice > ( now() - (8 * 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24))
| sum(credits) as credits by _timeslice
| avg(credits) as %"cr/day"
/* 
PLAN and THRESHOLDS 
*/
| 21900 / 365 as plan
| ( %"cr/day"/plan ) * 100 as pct_plan
| 95 as warning
| 100 as critical

// anniversary could be this year or next year
| now() as today
| formatdate(today,"MM") as current_month
| formatdate(today,"dd") as current_day
| formatdate(today,"yyyy") as current_year

| "2023/03/11" as end_date
| 365 as term_days
| parsedate (end_date,"yyyy/MM/dd") as contract_end

| formatdate(contract_end,"MM") as contract_month
| formatdate(contract_end,"dd") as contract_day
| formatdate(contract_end,"yyyy") as contract_year
| concat (round(contract_year + 1),"/",contract_month,"/",contract_day) as end_date_b
| parsedate (end_date_b,"yyyy/MM/dd") as contract_end_b

| if(contract_end - today  < 0,contract_end_b,contract_end) as adjusted_end_date
| floor((adjusted_end_date - today ) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) as days_left
| ceil(term_days - days_left) as days_used
| round( %"cr/day" * days_left) as cr_needed
| concat("Using: ",round(%"cr/day",2) ," cr/day. At this rate estimated: ",round(cr_needed)," credits will be used at current burn rate in: ", toint(days_left)," days until: ", formatdate(adjusted_end_date,"yyyy/MM/dd")) as string
| if(pct_plan > warning,"WARNING Daily credits rate is close to plan.","NORMAL. Credits daily rate is within acceptable limits.") as alert
| if(pct_plan > critical,"CRITICAL. Daily credits rate exceeds plan.",alert) as alert

| concat("Daily rate is: ",round(pct_plan,1),"% of of your plan. ",string) as string
| first (string) as estimate_credits_to_term, first(alert) as alert | concat(estimate_credits_to_term," You can compare this number of credits with the used/remaining number on your account page to determine how you are tracking to plan at current burn rate.") as estimate_credits_to_term

// use this where clause to only alert when usage is critical
| where !(Alert matches "*NORMAL*")

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  
analytics_tier=*infrequent*
not user_name=*sumosupport*
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as scan_inf  
| (query_end_time - query_start_time ) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as scan_days
| (scan_inf/1024/1024/1024 ) as scan_gb
| scan_gb * 0.016 as credits | sort credits
| sum(scan_gb) as scan_gb, sum(scan_days) as scan_days,count as searches, count_distinct(query) as unique_searches,sum(credits) as credits,max(credits) as max_credits,first(query) as most_expensive_query by user_name
| total credits as total_scan_credits_all_users

/*
Set thresholds here
*/

| 50 as max_credits_per_query
| 100 as max_credits_per_user
| 500 as max_credits_all_users

| if(total_scan_credits_all_users > max_credits_all_users,"Alert: all users infrequent scan limit exceeded","") as Alert
| if(max_credits > max_credits_per_query,"Alert: large single scan infrequent query",Alert) as alert
| if(credits > max_credits_per_user,"Alert: user exceeded infrequent scan limit",alert) as alert
| where length(alert) > 0
| concat(alert," Credits Limits: Per search: ",max_credits_per_query," Per User: ", max_credits_per_user," All Users: ",max_credits_all_users) as alert
| fields -max_credits_per_query,max_credits_per_user,max_credits_all_users

// anniversary could be this year or next year

/*
This is an ESTIMATE of storage only.
In order to make the estimate accurate we have to consider:
- retention may vary between customers and partitions
- storage rate are per total GB per day
- billing is on total for current day for all previously ingested GB so over it may take say 30,90 or even 365+ days before storage will peak
- long term growth rate of the account also impacts storage.

we could do a lot of math but it's better just to use fixed numbers based off your account page because storage changes slowly based on long term ingest averages
*/

_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=view_and_tier_volume 
//| parse regex "(?<element>\{[^\}]+})" multi 
//| json field=element "field", "dataTier", "sizeInBytes", "count" as name, uom, bytes, events 
| limit 1

// take these numbers from your account page
| 1 as daily_storage_gb
| 1 as daily_storage_gb_infrequent
| 0 as daily_storage_gb_security

| concat("storage:", daily_storage_gb,", storage_infrequent:",daily_storage_gb_infrequent,", storage_security:",daily_storage_gb_security) as storage_string
| parse regex field=storage_string "(?<uom>[a-z_]+):(?<units>[0-9]+)" multi
| queryendtime() as _timeslice
| "gbytes/day" as unit
| if( uom = "storage",.0067,.0015) as rate
| units / 24 as units
| units * rate as credits // we follow the principle you should be able to sum the 24 hours to = 1 day
//
// measure timeslice at end of time unit not start
| tolong(_timeslice + ( 1000 * 60 * 60)) as _timeslice

//// fix the double to long bug
| sum(credits) as credits,sum(units) as units by _timeslice,uom,unit,rate
| todouble(rate) as rate
| todouble(credits) as credits
| tolong(_timeslice ) as _timeslice
| todouble(units) as units

// use these to ensure your fixed numbers match account page totals
//| units * 24 as units_day
//| units_day * rate  as cr_day_a
//| credits *24 as cr_day_b

| bytes/1Gi as units

| todouble(units) as units

file: apps/guv/Metadata discovery using granular usage guv.json
dashboard: Metadata Discovery Using Granular Usage Visibility (GUV)

queries.query:
_index="sumologic_volume"
AND _sourcecategory = "granular_volume"

{{keywords}}
//// built in
| json field=_raw "messageTier" as datatier | where datatier matches "{{datatier}}"
| json field=_raw "sizeInBytes" as bytes  
| json field=_raw "messageCount" as events 
| json field=_raw "viewName"  as index | where index matches "{{partition}}"
//
//// defined in feature flag
| json field=_raw "collectorName" as collector nodrop | where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| json field=_raw "sourceCategory"  nodrop | where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| json field=_raw "bladeName" as source nodrop
//
| timeslice 5m
| sum(bytes) as bytes, sum(events) as events by datatier, collector,sourcecategory,source,index

// add credits from contract for tiers
| 20 as cr_rate 
| if (datatier = "Infrequent",.4,cr_rate) as cr_rate
| if (datatier = "Frequent",9,cr_rate) as cr_rate
| if (datatier = "CSE",25,cr_rate) as cr_rate
| bytes / 1Gi as gb | fields - bytes
| cr_rate * gb as credits 
| round(gb,2) as gb | round(credits,2) as credits
| sort credits | limit 1000

_index="sumologic_volume"
AND _sourcecategory = "granular_volume"

{{keywords}}
//// built in
| json field=_raw "messageTier" as datatier | where datatier matches "{{datatier}}"

queries.panelTitle: Queue Retries Exceeded, Queue Full Etc
queries.query:
_sourceCategory=*otelcol* cluster={{cluster}} namespace={{namespace}}

("No more retries" or "sender failed" or "Dropping data" or "max elapsed time expired" or "sending_queue is full")
| json field=_raw "log" 
| parse field=log "*\t*\t*:*\t*\t*" as datetime,level,file,line,error_type,details nodrop	
| where level matches /warn|error|fatal/
| parse regex field=log "(?<some_json>\{.+\})" nodrop
//| json field=some_json "action" nodrop
| json field=some_json "error" nodrop
//| json field=some_json "data_type" nodrop
//| json field=some_json "name" nodrop
| json field=some_json "kind" nodrop
| json field=some_json "pipeline" nodrop
| if (length(error)>200,concat(substring(error,0,200),"..."),error) as error
| count by cluster,pod,level,file,error_type,error,kind,pipeline |sort _count

queries.panelTitle: Pod Logs: Queue Retries Exceeded, Queue Full Etc

queries.query:
cluster={{cluster}} namespace={{namespace}}
 _sourceCategory=*events 
not "\"type\":\"Normal\""
(otelcol or prometheus or falco or otelagent or otelgateway)
// exclude any annoying messages here
involvedObject
not "Nameserver limits were exceeded"
not "Liveness probe failed"
| json field=_raw "object.reason" as reason
| json field=_raw "object.involvedObject.kind" as type
| json field=_raw "object.involvedObject.name" as name
| json field=_raw "object.type" as level
| json field=_raw "object.message" as message
| json field=_raw "object.metadata.namespace" as namespace
| count by cluster,reason,type,level,namespace,name,message
| sort _count

queries.panelTitle: Kubernetes Events Not Normal State Over Time By Reason

queries.query:
_sourceCategory=*otelcol* cluster={{cluster}} namespace={{namespace}}
// exclude chatty
not (tinfo and !(err* or warn* or fail* or retr*))
| json field=_raw "log"
| parse field=log "*\t*\t*\t*" as datetime,level,logger,event
| parse regex field=event "(?<json_data>\{.+\})"
| parse regex field=event "^(?<event_prefix>[^\r\n\{]+)" nodrop
| json field=json_data "error" nodrop
| json field=json_data "message" nodrop
| json field=json_data "code" nodrop
//| json field=json_data "status" nodrop
| json field=json_data "name" nodrop
//| json field=json_data "kind" nodrop

| if(isempty(message),error,message) as description

| where !(event_prefix matches "*started.")
| where !(event_prefix matches "Starting*")
| values(pod) as pods,count by cluster,namespace,level,event_prefix,description | sort _count

_sourcecategory=*kubelet*  cluster={{cluster}} 
(
CrashLoopBackOff
or
OOMKilled
or
(Error syncing pod) 
or (reason evicted) 
or ("Failed to pull image") 
or Failedattachvolume
or FailedattachMount
or FailedScheduling
or "MountVolume.SetUp failed"
or (configmap "not found") 
or (secret "not found") 
or NodeNotReady 
or HostPortConflict 
or "Failed to pull image"
or ( (error failed) not "when try to find container")
)
| json field=_raw "_HOSTNAME" as hostname
| json field=_raw "MESSAGE" | where message matches "E*" 
// key indicators
| parse regex field=message "(?i)(?<keyindicator>oomkilled|crashloopbackoff)" nodrop
| parse regex field=message "^(?<level>[A-Z])+[0-9]+\s+[0-9:\.]+\s+(?<threadid>[0-9]+)\s+(?<file>[^\s:]+):(?<lineno>[0-9]+)\]\s(?<event>.+)" nodrop
| parse regex field=event "(?i)(?<type>Error syncing pod|oomkilled|CrashLoopBackOff|evicted|Failedattachvolume|FailedattachMount|FailedScheduling|Error: [^\s]+ failed|configmap .+not found$|secret .+not found$|NodeNotReady|HostPortConflict|Failed to pull image)" nodrop 

// strict
| where !(isempty(type))

// wider
//| if(isempty(type),concat("others:",substring(event,0,50)),type) as type
| parse field=event "\"StartContainer\" for \"*\" with" as container nodrop
| trim(concat(type," ",keyindicator," ",container)) as type

//|  min(_messagetime) as starttime,max(_messagetime) as endtime,first(event) as example ,count by cluster,file,type,hostname 
| first(event) as example,values(hostname) as hosts,count as errors by cluster,file,type
| sort type asc
//| sum(_count) by type

cluster={{cluster}} _sourceCategory=*events  *node*
// not "\"type\":\"Normal\""
// exclude any annoying messages here
involvedObject
//node scal*
not "Nameserver limits were exceeded"
not "Liveness probe failed"
not FailedAttachVolume
not *hassufficient*
not *NodeHasNo*
not "Node is not ready"
| json field=_raw "object.reason" as reason
| json field=_raw "object.message" as message

queries.panelTitle: Top 10 Total Used CPU Seconds By Pod/Container
queries.query:
metric=container_cpu_usage_seconds_total cluster={{cluster}} pod=* 
// quantize by max not avg 
//| quantize using  rate | topk(50,max) 
| quantize {{quantize_interval}} //using rate
 | rate counter | avg by container, pod 
| topk(10,sum) 
| sum by container, pod

queries.panelTitle: Memory Usage vs Limits - Top 50 Per container/pod/cluster/node
queries.query:
metric=kube_pod_container_resource_limits resource=memory cluster=* pod=* node=*
| quantize {{quantize_interval}} using max 
 | avg by cluster, node, pod , container

queries.panelTitle: Memory Usage vs Limits - Top 50 Per container/pod/cluster/node
queries.query:
metric=container_memory_working_set_bytes cluster=* pod=* node=*
| quantize {{quantize_interval}} using avg 
| max by cluster, node, pod ,container

queries.panelTitle: Memory Usage vs Limits - Top 50 Per container/pod/cluster/node
queries.query: ((#B/#A) * 100) along cluster, node, pod , container| quantize {{quantize_interval}} | topk({{top_n}},max)

queries.panelTitle: CPU Usage % Top by Node, Cluster

queries.query:
cluster={{cluster}}  metric=kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total job=kube-state-metrics 
| quantize {{quantize_interval}} using max | filter max > 0 | delta counter | sum by pod,container 
| topk(20,sum)

cluster={{cluster}}  metric=kube_node_status_condition  status=true | quantize {{quantize_interval}} using max drop last | filter Max > 0
| sum by condition,status,cluster,node, provider | sum by condition

cluster={{cluster}}  metric=kube_node_status_condition  status=true (condition=*Pressure or condition=NetworkUnavilable )
 | quantize {{quantize_interval}} using max | filter max > 0| sum by condition
cluster={{cluster}}  metric=kube_pod_status_phase phase=Running | quantize {{quantize_interval}} | sum by namespace
cluster={{cluster}}  metric=kube_pod_status_phase !phase=Running !phase=succeeded  | quantize {{quantize_interval}} | sum by phase
cluster={{cluster}} metric=kube_pod_container_status_waiting_reason reason=crashloopbackoff | quantize {{quantize_interval}} using max | filter max >0 | sum by pod
cluster={{cluster}}  metric=kube_pod_container_status_terminated_reason not reason=completed | quantize {{quantize_interval}} using max | filter max > 0 | max by cluster,reason,pod | sum by pod

dashboard: Log Explorer - Find My Log Metadata

queries.query:
_sourceCategory={{category}} {{search_keywords}}
| "{{search_keywords}}" as sk
| min(_messagetime) as f, max(_messagetime) as l, count by _sourcecategory,_collector,_source,sk,_view,_sourcename
| sort _sourcecategory asc, _collector asc,_source asc

// prepare the category strings
| if(_view="","SumologicDefault",_view) as index
| concat("_index=",index) as  i
| concat("_sourcecategory=",_sourcecategory) as sc
| concat("_collector=",_collector) as c
| concat("_source=",_source) as s 
| concat("_sourcename=",_sourcename) as sn

| if("yes" = "{{add_index}}",i,"") as i
| if("yes" = "{{add_sourcecategory}}",sc,"") as sc
| if("yes" = "{{add_collector}}",c,"") as c
| if("yes" = "{{add_source}}",s,"") as s
| if("yes" = "{{add_sourcename}}",sn,"") as sn

| toint(floor((now()-f ) / (1000 * 60))) as f_min_ago
| toint(ceil((now()-l ) / (1000 * 60))) as l_min_ago
| concat("-",f_min_ago,"m -",l_min_ago,"m") as rel_expression
| fields -f_min_ago,l_min_ago

// suppress scientific notation must be epoch
| format( "%.0f",f) as f
| format( "%.0f",l) as l

// fix if they put a space in their stuff

| replace(i," ","?") as i
| replace(sc," ","?") as sc
| replace(c," ","?") as c
| replace(s," ","?") as s
| replace(sn," ","?") as sn


// create one meta to avoid the 10 param limit on concat using multiple concats.
| i as meta
| concat (meta,"\n ",sc," ",c) as meta
| concat (meta,"\n ",s," ",sn,"\n") as meta
| trim(meta) as meta
| concat(meta,"\n ",sk) as search

| tourl(concat("https://{{my_org}}/ui/#/search/@",f,",",l,"@",urlencode(search)),"Right Click Open Search Tab") as  %"Open This Search" | fields -sc ,sk,c,s,f,l,i,sn,meta

| sort _sourcecategory asc, _collector asc, _source asc, _view asc

_sourceCategory={{category}} {{search_keywords}}
| "{{search_keywords}}" as sk
| _view as index
| count_distinct(_collector) as collectors, count_distinct(_source) as sources, count_distinct(_sourcename) as sourcenames,min(_messagetime) as f, max(_messagetime) as l, count by _sourcecategory,index
| if(isempty(index),"SumologicDefault",index) as index
| formatdate(tolong(f),"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss ZZZ") as first_event
| formatdate(tolong(l),"yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss ZZZ") as last_event
| round((l-f) / (1000 * 60)) as range_min
| toint(floor((now()-f ) / (1000 * 60))) as f_min_ago
| toint(ceil((now()-l ) / (1000 * 60))) as l_min_ago
| concat(f_min_ago,"m ",l_min_ago,"m") as rel_expression
| fields -f,l,f_min_ago,l_min_ago
| sort _sourcecategory asc,index asc

_sourceCategory={{category}} {{search_keywords}}
| "{{search_keywords}}" as sk
| _view as index
| values(index) as indexes,first(_raw) as example,values(_collector) as collectors, values(_source) as sources, values(_sourcename) as sourcenames, count by _sourcecategory
| if(length(example)>500,concat(substring(example,0,500),"..."),example) as example
| sort _sourcecategory asc,indexes asc,_count

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  
not query_type="Scheduled Views"
| where ("{{global_regex_search}}" = ".*") or (query matches /(?i){{global_regex_search}}/)

// we have a real pickle here because users could provide "foo" foo?bar foo*bar foo* etc and not valid to match vs query which is a much larger string
// reformat the supplied params into a single result
//| concat("{{sourcecategory}}|{{collector}}|{{index}}|{{sourcehost}}","") as blob
| "{{sourcecategory}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob
| "{{collector}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob
| "{{index}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob
| "{{sourcehost}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob

//| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as scan_inf  
//| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 ) as range_minutes
//| execution_duration_ms / 1000 as runtime
| content_name as name | trim(query) as q
| if(length(query)>500,concat(substring(query,0,500),"..."),query) as query
//| first(q) as q,count as searches,avg(range_minutes) as %"range(m)",avg(scanned_partition_count) as partitions, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scan_bytes,avg(runtime) as avg_runtime by query_type,name,query //,session_id
| first(q) as q,count as searches by query_type,name,query //,session_id
| sort name asc, query asc | limit 1000
//| round(scan_bytes / 1G,1) as scan_gb | fields -scan_bytes
//| round(avg_runtime,1) as %"runtime(s)"
//| round(%"range(m)",1) as %"range(m)"
| trim(concat("// ",query_type," ",name)) as qn 
| trim(query) as query
| urlencode (concat(qn,"\n",q)) as q
| "https://{{my_instance_name}}.sumologic.com/ui/#/search/create?query=" as dp
| concat("[run search](",dp,q,")") as %"Run Search"
| fields -dp,q,qn

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  
not query_type="Scheduled Views"
| where ("{{global_regex_search}}" = ".*") or (query matches /(?i){{global_regex_search}}/)

// we have a real pickle here because users could provide "foo" foo?bar foo*bar foo* etc and not valid to match vs query which is a much larger string
// reformat the supplied params into a single result
//| concat("{{sourcecategory}}|{{collector}}|{{index}}|{{sourcehost}}","") as blob
| "{{sourcecategory}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob
| "{{collector}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob
| "{{index}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob
| "{{sourcehost}}" as blob 
| if(substring(blob,0,1)="*",blob,concat("*",blob)) as blob 
| substring(blob,length(blob)-1,length(blob)) as end
| if( end = "*",blob,concat(blob,"*")) as blob
| where query matches blob

//| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as scan_inf  
//| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 ) as range_minutes
//| execution_duration_ms / 1000 as runtime
| content_name as name | trim(query) as q
| if(length(query)>500,concat(substring(query,0,500),"..."),query) as query
//| first(q) as q,count as searches,avg(range_minutes) as %"range(m)",avg(scanned_partition_count) as partitions, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scan_bytes,avg(runtime) as avg_runtime by query_type,name,query //,session_id
| count by query_type | sort query_type asc

_sourcecategory=*
| timeslice 15m
| count as events,sum(_size) as bytes  by _timeslice,_collector,_sourcecategory,_source,_sourcehost,_view // ,_siemforward
| "flex_default" as tier  // fixed attirbution
//| if(_siemforward="true","flex","cse") as tier // dynamic based on field
| _view as index | fields -_view  
| if (isempty(index),"sumologic_default",index) as index

// lowercase everything to simplify filtering and reduce cardinality
| tolowercase(_collector) as collector
| tolowercase(_source) as source
| tolowercase(_sourcecategory) as sourcecategory
| tolowercase(_sourcehost) as sourcehost

// final aggregation to view
| sum(events) as events,sum(bytes) as bytes  by _timeslice,collector,sourcecategory,source,sourcehost,index,tier
| save view metadata_default_v1

_datatier=infrequent
| timeslice 15m
| count as events,sum(_size) as bytes  by _timeslice,_collector,_sourcecategory,_source,_sourcehost,_view // ,_siemforward
| "infrequent" as tier  // fixed attirbution
//| if(_siemforward="true","flex","cse") as tier // dynamic based on field
| _view as index | fields -_view  
| if (isempty(index),"sumologic_default",index) as index

// lowercase everything to simplify filtering and reduce cardinality
| tolowercase(_collector) as collector
| tolowercase(_source) as source
| tolowercase(_sourcecategory) as sourcecategory
| tolowercase(_sourcehost) as sourcehost

// final aggregation to view
| sum(events) as events,sum(bytes) as bytes  by _timeslice,collector,sourcecategory,source,sourcehost,index,tier
| save view metadata_infrequent_v1

queries.panelTitle: Matching Keywords Found With Metadata Type
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume 
_sourcecategory=*_and_tier_volume
//(_sourceCategory = collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=source_and_tier_volume )
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as meta_value, dataTier, bytes, count
| bytes/1Gi as gbytes 
//| sum(count) as events,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by collector
| tolowercase(meta_value) as meta_value
| where meta_value matches tolowercase("{{keyword_matches}}")  and meta_value matches /(?i){{keyword_regular_expression}}/
| count by meta_value,_sourcecategory

| parse field=_sourcecategory "*_and_*" as meta_type,junk //| fields -junk,_sourcecategory,_some_matched 
| parse regex field=meta_value "(?<string>[a-z][0-9a-z-]{2,})" multi
| count by meta_type,string | sort meta_type asc,string asc
| now() as _messagetime 
| transactionize meta_type (merge meta_type takefirst, string join with " ")
| fields -_messagetime

_index=sumologic_volume 
_sourcecategory=sourceCategory_and_tier_volume
//(_sourceCategory = collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=source_and_tier_volume )
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as meta_value, dataTier, bytes, count
| bytes/1Gi as gbytes 
| sum(count) as events,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by collector,meta_value,dataTier,_sourcecategory
| tolowercase(meta_value) as meta_value
| where meta_value matches tolowercase("{{keyword_matches}}")  and meta_value matches /(?i){{keyword_regular_expression}}/
| sum(events) as events, sum(gbytes) as gbytes by meta_value,_sourcecategory,dataTier
| parse field=_sourcecategory "*_and_*" as meta_type,junk | fields -junk,_sourcecategory,_some_matched 
| round(gbytes,3) as gbytes
| sort meta_value asc,dataTier asc
| concat("_",meta_type,"=",meta_value) as search

_index=sumologic_volume 
_sourcecategory=collector_and_tier_volume
//(_sourceCategory = collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=source_and_tier_volume )
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as meta_value, dataTier, bytes, count
| bytes/1Gi as gbytes 
| sum(count) as events,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by collector,meta_value,dataTier,_sourcecategory
| tolowercase(meta_value) as meta_value
| where meta_value matches tolowercase("{{keyword_matches}}")  and meta_value matches /(?i){{keyword_regular_expression}}/
| sum(events) as events, sum(gbytes) as gbytes by meta_value,_sourcecategory,dataTier
| parse field=_sourcecategory "*_and_*" as meta_type,junk | fields -junk,_sourcecategory,_some_matched

| sort meta_value asc,dataTier asc
| concat("_",meta_type,"=",meta_value) as search

_index=sumologic_volume 
_sourcecategory=source_and_tier_volume
//(_sourceCategory = collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=source_and_tier_volume )
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as meta_value, dataTier, bytes, count
| bytes/1Gi as gbytes

_index=sumologic_volume

//(_sourceCategory = collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=source_and_tier_volume )
