queries.panelTitle: View (also known as index or partition) Found With Search String
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume 
_sourcecategory=view_and_tier_volume
//(_sourceCategory = collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=collector_and_tier_volume or _sourcecategory=source_and_tier_volume )
| parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
| json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as meta_value, dataTier, bytes, count
| if(meta_value = "Default Index","sumologic_default",meta_value) as meta_value
| bytes/1Gi as gbytes 
| sum(count) as events,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by collector,meta_value,dataTier,_sourcecategory
| tolowercase(meta_value) as meta_value
| where meta_value matches tolowercase("{{keyword_matches}}")  and meta_value matches /(?i){{keyword_regular_expression}}/
| sum(events) as events, sum(gbytes) as gbytes by meta_value,_sourcecategory,dataTier
| parse field=_sourcecategory "*_and_*" as meta_type,junk | fields -junk,_sourcecategory,_some_matched 
| round(gbytes,3) as gbytes
| sort meta_value asc,dataTier asc
| concat("_",meta_type,"=",meta_value) as search

cat {{lookup_datamap}}
| where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| where tolowercase(index) matches tolowercase("{{index}}")
| where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| concat(collector,index,source,sourcecategory,sourcename) as blob | where blob matches /(?i){{any_meta_regex}}/
|  sum(events) as events by collector
| sort collector asc

cat {{lookup_datamap}}
| where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| where tolowercase(index) matches tolowercase("{{index}}")
| where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| concat(collector,index,source,sourcecategory,sourcename) as blob | where blob matches /(?i){{any_meta_regex}}/
| concat(index," ",sourcecategory) as index_category
| concat("_index=",index," _sourcecategory=",sourcecategory ) as %"Search Scope"
| sum(events) as events, first(collector) as collector, first(source) as source, first(sourcename) as sourcename by index,sourcecategory,%"Search Scope" 
| total events as te | 100 * ( events/te) as percent | fields -te

// tiers
| tolowercase(index) as index
| lookup datatier from /shared/lookups/partitions on index=index

// this might change per sumo instance!  
| "https://{{my_instance_name}}.sumologic.com/ui/#/search/create?query=" as dp

// prepare the category strings
| concat(" _sourcecategory=",sourcecategory) as sc
| concat("\n _index=",index) as i
| concat("\n// _collector=",replace(collector," ","?")) as c
| concat("\n// _source=",replace(source," ","?")) as s
| concat("\n// _sourcename=",replace(sourcename," ","?")) as sn
| urlencode(concat(i,sc,c,s,sn)) as the_search

// make final url columns
| tourl(concat(dp,the_search),"New Search") as  %"Search By Sourcecategory"

| fields -dp,sc,i,c,sn,s,the_search, collector,source,sourcename
| sort index asc,sourcecategory asc | fields -percent

cat {{lookup_datamap}}
| where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| where tolowercase(index) matches tolowercase("{{index}}")
| where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| concat(collector,index,source,sourcecategory,sourcename) as blob | where blob matches /(?i){{any_meta_regex}}/
|  sum(events) as events by source
| sort source asc

cat {{lookup_datamap}}
| where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| where tolowercase(index) matches tolowercase("{{index}}")
| where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| concat(collector,index,source,sourcecategory,sourcename) as blob | where blob matches /(?i){{any_meta_regex}}/
|  sum(events) as events by sourcecategory | sort sourcecategory asc

cat {{lookup_datamap}}
| where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| where tolowercase(index) matches tolowercase("{{index}}")
| where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| concat(collector,index,source,sourcecategory,sourcename) as blob | where blob matches /(?i){{any_meta_regex}}/
|  sum(events) as events by sourcename
 | sort sourcename asc

queries.panelTitle: Partitions (indexes) Ingesting Data Matching the  Metadata Scope
queries.query:
cat {{lookup_datamap}}
| where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| where tolowercase(index) matches tolowercase("{{index}}")
| where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| concat(collector,index,source,sourcecategory,sourcename) as blob | where blob matches /(?i){{any_meta_regex}}/
//| concat(index," ",sourcecategory) as index_category
| concat("_index=",index ) as %"Index Search Scope"
| tolowercase(index) as %"Partition Name"
| count by %"Partition Name",%"Index Search Scope" 
| sort %"Partition Name" asc | fields -_count
| lookup datatier from {{lookup_partitions}} on index=%"Partition Name"

queries.panelTitle: Open Specific Log File : Search scope includes all metadata

cat {{lookup_datamap}}
| where collector matches "{{collector}}"
| where tolowercase(index) matches tolowercase("{{index}}")
| where sourcecategory matches "{{sourcecategory}}"
| concat(collector,index,source,sourcecategory,sourcename) as blob | where blob matches /(?i){{any_meta_regex}}/
| concat(index," ",sourcecategory) as index_category

| sort {{metadata_values_by}} asc

queries.panelTitle: Metric Audit Data: All Metric Dimension Values for: metric={{metric_name}}
queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory = byMetricDimensionValueDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as tag, 3 as value, 4 as dp
| where metric matches tolowercase("{{metric_name}}")
| sum(dp) as datapoints by tag,value | sort tag asc, value asc| limit 1440

queries.panelTitle: Metric Audit Date: All Metric Cardinalities for: metric={{metric_name}}
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory = "byMetricDimensionCardinalities" 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dimension, 3 as cardinality
| where metric matches tolowercase("{{metric_name}}")
| where metric matches /.*/
| max(cardinality) as max_cardinality group by metric,dimension
| sort metric asc, dimension asc

queries.panelTitle: 'Open in Metrics Search' on this panel for a headstart on metrics Search: metric={{metric_name}}   _sourcecategory={{_sourcecategory}}  _collector={{_collector}}  {{tag_filter_name}} = {{tag_filter_value}}
Total Data Points Overall By Metric Name
queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=byMetricDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dp
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| sum(dp) as totalDp group by metric
| order by totaldp desc

queries.panelTitle: Metrics By DPM Over Time By Metric. timeslice: {{timeslice}} DPM < {{min_dpm_other}} rolled to "others"
queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=byMetricDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dp
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| timeslice {{timeslice}}
| (__timeslice_end - _timeslice)/ (1000 * 60) as ts_min
| max(ts_min) as ts_min,sum(dp) as totalDp group by metric,_timeslice
| round(totalDp / ts_min, 0) as dpm
| if (dpm < {{min_dpm_other}},"others",metric) as metric
| fields -totalDp,ts_min | transpose row _timeslice column metric

queries.panelTitle: Last 7d Estimated DPM vs Previous Weeks
queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=byMetricDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dp
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| timeslice {{timeslice}}
| (__timeslice_end - _timeslice)/ (1000 * 60) as ts_min
|max(ts_min) as ts_min, sum(dp) as totalDp group by _timeslice
| round(totalDp / ts_min, 0) as dpm | fields -ts_min,totaldp
| compare with timeshift {{compare_with}}

_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory = "byMetricDimensionCardinalities"
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dimension, 3 as cardinality
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| max(cardinality) as max_cardinality group by metric,dimension
| sort max_cardinality | limit 200
| compare with timeshift {{compare_with}} | sort max_cardinality

queries.panelTitle: Top Data Points (DP), Estimated Data Points Per Minute (DPM ) and Estimated Credits Per Day (< {{min_dpm_other}} DPM grouped as "others")
queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=byMetricDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dp
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| sum(dp) as totalDp by metric
| (queryendtime() - querystarttime())/(1000 * 60) as query_min
| round(totalDp / query_min, 0) as dpm //| fields -query_min
| if (dpm < {{min_dpm_other}},"others",metric) as metric
| sum(totaldp) as %"Total Data Points",sum(dpm) as %"Est. DPM", count as metrics by metric
| sort %"Est. DPM" //| limit 100
| total %"Total Data Points" as all_dp
| (%"Total Data Points"/all_dp) * 100 as %"Pct of DP" | fields -all_dp
| %"Est. DPM" / 1000 * 3 as %"Est. Daily Credits"

_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory = "byMetricDimensionCardinalities"
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dimension, 3 as cardinality
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| timeslice {{timeslice}}
| timeslice 15m
| max(cardinality) as max_cardinality group by metric,dimension,_timeslice
| sum(max_cardinality) as total_max_cardinalities by _timeslice

| compare with timeshift {{compare_with}}

(_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=byMetricDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dp
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| timeslice {{timeslice}}
| count by metric ,_timeslice //,dimension,_timeslice
| count as metrics by _timeslice
| compare with timeshift {{compare_with}}

queries.panelTitle: Top 25 DPM by Metric Series Names Over Time: {{timeslice}}
queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=byMetricDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dp
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| timeslice {{timeslice}}
| (__timeslice_end - _timeslice)/ (1000 * 60) as ts_min
| max(ts_min) as ts_min,sum(dp) as totalDp group by metric,_timeslice
| round(totalDp / ts_min, 0) as dpm
//| if (dpm < {{min_dpm_other}},"others",metric) as metric
| fields -totalDp,ts_min 
| topk (25,dpm) by metric,_timeslice | fields -_rank
| transpose row _timeslice column metric

queries.panelTitle: Data Points vs 28d Ago For metrics matching: {{metric_matches}}
queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory=byMetricDataPoints) 
| parse "intervalStart: *\n" as interval
| parse regex "\n(?<singleRecord>.*)" multi
| split singleRecord delim=';' extract 1 as metric, 2 as dp
| where metric matches /{{metric_matches}}/
| sum(dp) as totalDp by metric
| (queryendtime() - querystarttime())/(1000 * 60) as query_min
| round(totalDp / query_min, 0) as dpm //| fields -query_min
| if (dpm < {{min_dpm_other}},"others",metric) as metric
| sum(totaldp) as %"Total Data Points",sum(dpm) as %"Est. DPM", count as metrics by metric
| sort %"Est. DPM" //| limit 100
| compare with timeshift {{compare_with}} | sort %"Total Data Points"

file: apps/monitors/Alert Tuning - Monitor or Schedule Search.json
dashboard: Alert Tuning - Monitor and Scheduled Searches

queries.query:
_index=sumologic_system_events _sourceCategory=alerts 
| json field=_raw "details.monitorInfo.monitorPath" as path
| parse regex field=path "\/Monitor\/(?<folder>.+)\/[^\/]+" 
| json field=_raw "details.monitorInfo.monitorName" as monitor_name
| json field=_raw "eventTime"
| json field=_raw "details.alertingGroup.currentState" as monitor_current_status
| json field=_raw "details.monitorInfo.monitorId" as monitor_id
| json field=_raw "resourceIdentity.id" as alert_id
| concat("https://service.sumologic.com/ui/#/alert/", alert_id) as alert_url
| tourl(alert_url, alert_id) as alert
| first(monitor_current_status) as monitor_latest_status by monitor_id, monitor_name, folder, eventTime, alert
| where !(monitor_latest_status matches "Normal")

_index=sumologic_system_events _sourceCategory=alerts AlertCreated
| json field=_raw "details.monitorInfo.monitorName" as monitor_name
| json "details.name" as alert_event_name
| json "details.monitorInfo.monitorId" as monitorId
| where alert_event_name = "AlertCreated"
| timeslice 15m
| count as fired by _timeslice

_index=sumologic_system_events _sourceCategory=alerts AlertCreated
| json field=_raw "details.monitorInfo.monitorName" as monitor_name
| json "details.name" as alert_event_name
| json "details.monitorInfo.monitorId" as monitorId
| where alert_event_name = "AlertCreated"
| count as fired

_index=sumologic_system_events _sourceCategory=alerts AlertCreated
| json field=_raw "details.monitorInfo.monitorName" as monitor_name
| json "details.name" as alert_event_name
| json "details.monitorInfo.monitorId" as monitorId
| where alert_event_name = "AlertCreated"
| count as fired by monitor_name
| sort fired
| total fired as total
| (fired/total)*100 as pct
| round(pct,2) as pct

_index=sumologic_system_events _sourceCategory=alerts

| json field=_raw "details.alertDuration" as duration nodrop

| if (isnull(duration),"0",duration ) as duration

| count

(_index=sumologic_audit _sourceCategory=SCHEDULED_SEARCH) 
| parse "*[" as message
| keyvalue regex "=([^\]]*)\]" "Name","AlertType","Destination","StatusCode"  nodrop
| where action not in ("UPDATE","START","DELETE","FINISH","CREATE") and message !="Scheduled search alert triggered "
| count by action, message
| sort by action,_count

queries.panelTitle: Search Webhook Triggers With Non 200 Status Code

_index=sumologic_audit and _sourceName=SCHEDULED_SEARCH triggered statuscode
| parse "*[" as message
| keyvalue regex "=([^\]]*)\]" "Name","AlertType","Destination","StatusCode"  nodrop
//| where action not in ("UPDATE","START","DELETE","FINISH","CREATE") and message !="Scheduled search alert triggered "
| where !(statuscode=200)
| count by  name, alerttype,destination,statuscode
| sort by _count

| if (user_agent matches "*Windows *" OR user_agent matches "*Win32*" OR user_agent matches "*Win64*","Windows","") as OS

| if (OS == "","Other",OS) as OS

| if (user_agent matches "*Firefox*","Firefox",Browser) as Browser

| if (OS=="Android" AND user_agent matches "*WebKit*","WebKit",Browser) as Browser
| if ((OS=="iPhone" OR OS=="iPad") AND (user_agent matches "*Mobile/*" OR user_agent matches "*AppleWebKit*(KHTML*Gecko)*"),"Mobile Safari",Browser) as Browser
| if (browser == "" AND OS=="MacOS" AND user_agent matches "Mozilla/* (Macintosh;*(KHTML, like Gecko)*","Safari",Browser) as Browser 
| if (user_agent matches "*MobileSafari/*","Mobile Safari",Browser) as Browser

| if (user_agent matches "Opera*","Opera",Browser) as Browser

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}   ("macintosh" OR "mac os" OR "windows" OR "i686" or "PC" or ("Linux" AND !android))
 
| parse regex field=user_agent "(?<os>Mac OS) (?<version>[^;\)]+?)(?:;|\))" nodrop 
| parse regex field=user_agent "(?<os>Windows)(?: NT | )(?<version>[\d.]+)" nodrop 
| parse regex field=user_agent "(?<os>Linux) (?<version>\S+?)(?:\)|;)" nodrop 
| where os != ""
| count as count by os, version
| transpose row Version column Os

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| if (user_agent matches "*iPad*" OR user_agent matches "*iPhone*" OR user_agent matches "*Android*" OR user_agent matches "*BlackBerry*" OR user_agent matches "*Galaxy*" OR user_agent matches "LGE-*" OR user_agent matches "SCH-*" OR user_agent matches "*HUAWEI-*" OR user_agent matches "*SAMSUNG*" OR user_agent matches "*samsung*" OR user_agent matches "Dalvik/*" OR user_agent matches "Nokia*" OR user_agent matches "LG-*" OR user_agent matches "*CFNetwork*"  OR user_agent matches "*UP.Browser/*" OR user_agent matches "*QQ*rowser*" OR user_agent matches "*NetFront/*" OR user_agent matches "*Windows Phone*" OR user_agent matches "*Mobile Safari*" OR user_agent matches "*iemobile*","Mobile","") as type
| if (user_agent matches "*Windows*" OR user_agent matches "*Win64*" OR user_agent matches "*Win32*" OR user_agent matches "*i686*" OR user_agent matches "*x86*","PC",type) as type
| if (user_agent matches "*Macintosh*" OR user_agent matches "*Mac OS*","Mac",type) as type
| if (type = "","bots/unknown",type) as type
| timeslice 5m
| count by _timeslice, type
| transpose row _timeslice column type

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| timeslice 5m
| count by _timeslice,  c_ip
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| where !isNull(country_name) AND country_name != ""
| count by _timeslice, country_name
| transpose row _timeslice column country_name as *

queries.panelTitle: Visits by US Regions Over Time
queries.query:
_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| timeslice 5m
| count by _timeslice,  c_ip
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| where country_name="United States" AND !isNull(region) AND region !=""
| count by _timeslice, region
| transpose row _timeslice column region as *

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| count by  c_ip
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| sort _count

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| count by  c_ip
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip =  c_ip
| count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| where country_name="United States" AND !isNull(region) AND region !=""
| sort _count

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| count as count by url
| sort by count
| limit 5

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| where referrer != "-"
| count as count by referrer
| sort by count
| limit 5

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| parse regex field=cs_uri_stem "^/[^\?]+?\.(?<type>[a-zA-Z]{2,4})$" 
| parse regex field=cs_uri_stem "/\S+?(?<email_prefix>(?:%40|@)[^.]+?)\.\w+" nodrop 
| where email_prefix="" 
| count as count by type
| sort by count, type asc

queries.panelTitle: Top 10 Search Terms from Popular Search Engines
queries.query:
_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}   (google OR bing OR aol OR ask OR yahoo) ("p=" OR "q=" OR "wd=" OR "searchfor=")
 
| parse regex field=referrer "(?:\?|&)(?:p|q|wd|searchfor)=(?<search_term>[^=]+?)(?:&|$)" nodrop 
| where search_term != ""
| urldecode(search_term)
| if(referrer matches "*google.*", "Google", "") as engine
| if(referrer matches "*bing.*", "Bing", engine) as engine
| if(referrer matches "*ask.com*", "Ask.com", engine) as engine
| if(referrer matches "*aol.*", "AOL", engine) as engine
| if(referrer matches "*yahoo.*", "Yahoo", engine) as engine
| where engine !="" 
| count as count by search_term
| sort count
| limit 10

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
|  sum(sc_bytes) as Bytes_Served
| Bytes_Served/(1024*1024*1000) as Gbytes_Served
| fields Gbytes_Served

_sourcecategory={{sourcecategory}} {{keywords}}  
 
| count by cs_method

_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=sourcecategory_and_tier_volume

// Excluding current day (incomplete data set)
| formatdate(now(), "YYYY-MM-dd") as currenDay
| formatdate(_messageTime, "YYYY-MM-dd") as eventDay
| where eventDay != currenDay

// Excluding first day in the query (incomplete data set)
| formatdate(queryStartTime(), "YYYY-MM-dd") as queryStartDay
| where eventDay != queryStartDay

// Parsing events 
| parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<sourcecategory>[^\"]*)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<tier>[^\"]*)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<bytes>\d*),\"count\":(?<events>\d*)}" multi nodrop
| where tier = "CSE"

// Discarding internal values
| where !(sourcecategory matches "*_volume")

// Aggregating per day - sum of bytes as GBytes per data tier
| timeslice 1d
| sum(bytes) as bytes by _timeslice, tier
| bytes/1Gi as GBytes

// Calculating credit cost per Gbyte per data tier
| {{INGEST_CSE}} as credit_cost

// Calculating the sum of credits used per day
| (GBytes*credit_cost) as credits
| sum(credits) as credits by _timeslice
| max(credits) as credits
| round(credits) as credits

| where eventDay != queryStartDay

// Parsing events 
| parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<sourcecategory>[^\"]*)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<tier>[^\"]*)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<bytes>\d*),\"count\":(?<events>\d*)}" multi nodrop
| where tier = "CSE"

// Discarding internal values
| where !(sourcecategory matches "*_volume")

| fields _timeslice, predicted

_index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=sourcecategory_metrics_volume

| avg(credits) as credits
| round(credits) as credits

_index=sumologic_search_usage_per_query
  AND !(status_message = "Query canceled")
  AND !(user_name = security+sumosupport+*@sumologic.com) 

// Excluding current day (incomplete data set)
| formatdate(now(), "YYYY-MM-dd") as currenDay
| formatdate(_messageTime, "YYYY-MM-dd") as eventDay
| where eventDay != currenDay

// Excluding first day in the query (incomplete data set)
| formatdate(queryStartTime(), "YYYY-MM-dd") as queryStartDay
| where eventDay != queryStartDay

// selecting FLEX scans only
| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Flex" as bytes nodrop

// Aggregating per day - sum of bytes as GBytes per data tier
| timeslice 1d
| sum(bytes) as bytes by _timeslice
| bytes/1Ti as tbytes

| {{SCAN}} as credit_cost

// Calculating the sum of credits used per day
| tbytes * credit_cost as credits
| sum(credits) as credits by _timeslice
| avg(credits) as credits
| round(credits) as credits

queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 

// flex billable
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Flex" as  scan_fl nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for billable scan
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Continuous" as  scan_con nodrop // value also turns up in flex orgs sometimes in small amounts
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Frequent" as  scan_fre nodrop
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Infrequent" as  scan_inf nodrop

// not flex billable
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "FlexSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for CSE scanned logs (not flex billable)
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "ContinuousSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // CSE scan in a legacy org
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Security" as  scan_sec nodrop // reflected sec_* indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Tracing" as  scan_trc nodrop // scan of tracing indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "RCE" as  scan_RCE nodrop
// {}   note it's also possible to see an empty array

| if(isnull(scan_fl),0,scan_fl) as scan_fl
| if(isnull(scan_con),0,scan_con) as scan_con
| if(isnull(scan_fre),0,scan_fre) as scan_fre
| if(isnull(scan_inf),0,scan_inf) as scan_inf
| if(isnull(scan_cse),0,scan_cse) as scan_cse
| if(isnull(scan_sec),0,scan_sec) as scan_sec
| if(isnull(scan_trc),0,scan_trc) as scan_trc
| if(isnull(scan_RCE),0,scan_RCE) as scan_rce

| scan_fl + scan_con + scan_fre + scan_inf as scan_bytes_flex_billable
//| cse as scan_bytes_cse
| scan_sec + scan_trc + scan_rce as scan_bytes_not_flex_billable

| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/ (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as range_days
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s

| scan_bytes_flex_billable/1T as t

| sum(t) as tb_scan

| "YES" as dummy
| where [subquery: 
  _index=sumologic_volume _sourcecategory=view_and_tier_volume
  | parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi
  | json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as index, dataTier, bytes, count
  | where bytes>0
  | sum(bytes) as bytes by datatier
  | where  dataTier matches /(?i)flex$|continuous$|frequent|infrequent/
  | bytes / 1T as tb 
  | sum(tb) as tb
  | 1 as key
  | save /temp/ingest
  | "YES" as dummy | compose dummy
]
| 1 as key
| lookup tb from /temp/ingest on key=key
| tb_scan / tb as scan_ratio | fields scan_ratio

queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
{{{filter}}}


// flex billable
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Flex" as  scan_fl nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for billable scan
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Continuous" as  scan_con nodrop // value also turns up in flex orgs sometimes in small amounts
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Frequent" as  scan_fre nodrop
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Infrequent" as  scan_inf nodrop

// not flex billable
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "FlexSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for CSE scanned logs (not flex billable)
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "ContinuousSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // CSE scan in a legacy org
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Security" as  scan_sec nodrop // reflected sec_* indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Tracing" as  scan_trc nodrop // scan of tracing indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "RCE" as  scan_RCE nodrop
// {}   note it's also possible to see an empty array

| if(isnull(scan_fl),0,scan_fl) as scan_fl
| if(isnull(scan_con),0,scan_con) as scan_con
| if(isnull(scan_fre),0,scan_fre) as scan_fre
| if(isnull(scan_inf),0,scan_inf) as scan_inf
| if(isnull(scan_cse),0,scan_cse) as scan_cse
| if(isnull(scan_sec),0,scan_sec) as scan_sec
| if(isnull(scan_trc),0,scan_trc) as scan_trc
| if(isnull(scan_RCE),0,scan_RCE) as scan_rce

| scan_fl + scan_con + scan_fre + scan_inf as scan_bytes_flex_billable
| where scan_bytes_flex_billable > ({{min_scan_gb_per_search}} * 1G)
//| cse as scan_bytes_cse
| scan_sec + scan_trc + scan_rce as scan_bytes_not_flex_billable

| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/ (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as range_days
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s

| scan_bytes_flex_billable/1T as t
| if(t >= 1 and t <10 ,1,0) as tb1
| if(t >= 10 and t <100,1,0) as tb10
| if(t >= 100 and t < 1000,1,0) as tb100
| if(t >= 1000,1,0) as tb1000

| count_distinct(query) as unique_queries,max(scanned_partition_count) as max_partitions,count as searches, sum(scan_bytes_flex_billable) as flex_bytes,max(scan_cse) as cse_bytes,sum(scan_bytes_not_flex_billable) as other_bytes, sum(tb1) as tb1, sum(tb10) as tb10, sum(tb100) as tb100,sum(tb1000) as tb1000, max(range_days) as max_day_range by user_name,query_type

| round(flex_bytes / 1T,1) as flex_tb
| round(cse_bytes / 1T,1) as cse_tb
| round(other_bytes / 1T,1) as other_tb
| round(max_day_range,1) as max_day_range
| fields -flex_bytes,cse_bytes,other_bytes
| sort flex_tb

| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Flex" as  scan_fl nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for billable scan
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Continuous" as  scan_con nodrop // value also turns up in flex orgs sometimes in small amounts
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Frequent" as  scan_fre nodrop
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Infrequent" as  scan_inf nodrop

// not flex billable
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "FlexSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for CSE scanned logs (not flex billable)
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "ContinuousSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // CSE scan in a legacy org
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Security" as  scan_sec nodrop // reflected sec_* indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Tracing" as  scan_trc nodrop // scan of tracing indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "RCE" as  scan_RCE nodrop
// {}   note it's also possible to see an empty array

| if(isnull(scan_fl),0,scan_fl) as scan_fl
| if(isnull(scan_con),0,scan_con) as scan_con
| if(isnull(scan_fre),0,scan_fre) as scan_fre
| if(isnull(scan_inf),0,scan_inf) as scan_inf
| if(isnull(scan_cse),0,scan_cse) as scan_cse
| if(isnull(scan_sec),0,scan_sec) as scan_sec
| if(isnull(scan_trc),0,scan_trc) as scan_trc
| if(isnull(scan_RCE),0,scan_RCE) as scan_rce

| scan_fl + scan_con + scan_fre + scan_inf as scan_bytes_flex_billable
| where scan_bytes_flex_billable > ({{min_scan_gb_per_search}} * 1G)
//| cse as scan_bytes_cse
| scan_sec + scan_trc + scan_rce as scan_bytes_not_flex_billable

| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/ (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as range_days
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s

| scan_bytes_flex_billable/1T as t

| sum(t) as flex_tb by query_type ,query
| sort flex_tb
| 1 as n | accum n as ranking
| "Others" as band

//| concat("E All ",other_items," Others") as band
| if (ranking <= 200,"D Top 100-200",band) as band
| if (ranking <= 100,"C Top 50-100",band) as band
| if (ranking <= 50,"B Top 20-50",band) as band
| if (ranking <= 20,"A Top 20",band) as band

| count as items,sum(flex_tb) as flex_tb by band,query_type 
| total items as ti | if(band="Others",concat("E Others: ",round(ti)," unique searches"),band) as band | fields -ti,items
| transpose row band column query_type

queries.panelTitle: Searches Over 30s Runtime Sorted By Average Runtime
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
// any search term
user_name = {{user_name}}

// some_field=some_value
{{custom_params}}
//query_type=*dash*
| where data_scanned_bytes > ({{minimum_gb_scan}} * 1G)
//| where execution_duration_ms > 15000
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| round(range_s/60/60/24) as range_day
| range_s/60 as range_min
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS

| if(duration_s > 30,1,0) as over_30s_runtime
| if(scanned_partition_count>10,1,0) as scans_many_partitions
| if(range_day >= 7 and range_day < 30,1,0) as gt_7d_range
| if(range_day >= 30,1,0) as gt_30d_range
| data_scanned_bytes / 1T as scan_tb
| if(scan_tb >= 10 and scan_tb < 100,1,0) as scan_gt_10tb
| if(scan_tb >= 100,1,0) as scan_gt_100tb
| sum(over_30s_runtime) as over_30s_runtime, sum(scans_many_partitions) as scans_many_partitions, sum(gt_7d_range) as gt_7d_range,sum(gt_30d_range) as gt_30d_range,sum(scan_gt_10tb) as scan_gt_10tb, sum(scan_gt_100tb) as scan_gt_100tb,avg(duration_s) as avg_run_secs,max(duration_s) as max_run_secs,max(scanned_partition_count) as max_partitions,values(user_name) as user_names,count as searches, sum(scan_tb) as scan_tb by query_type,query,content_name, range_day
//| parse regex field=query "(?i)(?<has_subquery>compare with timeshift|\[ *subquery:)" nodrop
//| substring(query,0,500) as query


| querytimerange() / (1000 * 60) as qrm 
| range_day * 1440 as range_minutes
| qrm / searches as ran_every
| range_minutes / ran_every as %"range:schedule"

| where over_30s_runtime > 0 
| fields -over_30s_runtime,scans_many_partitions,gt_7d_range,gt_30d_range,scan_gt_10tb,scan_gt_100tb,qrm
| sort avg_run_secs 
| limit 50

| if(range_day >= 7 and range_day < 30,1,0) as gt_7d_range
| if(range_day >= 30,1,0) as gt_30d_range
| data_scanned_bytes / 1T as scan_tb

| sum(over_30s_runtime) as over_30s_runtime, sum(scans_many_partitions) as scans_many_partitions, sum(gt_7d_range) as gt_7d_range,sum(gt_30d_range) as gt_30d_range,sum(scan_gt_10tb) as scan_gt_10tb, sum(scan_gt_100tb) as scan_gt_100tb,avg(duration_s) as avg_run_secs,max(duration_s) as max_run_secs,max(scanned_partition_count) as max_partitions,values(user_name) as user_names,count as searches, sum(scan_tb) as scan_tb by query_type,query,content_name, range_day
//| parse regex field=query "(?i)(?<has_subquery>compare with timeshift|\[ *subquery:)" nodrop

| sort scan_tb

queries.panelTitle: Top Scanners: User and Query Type. Use this panel to locate the user / workload combinations that drive high scans.
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
{{{filter}}}

| where data_scanned_bytes > ({{min_scan_gb_per_search}} * 1G)
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
| if(execution_duration_ms > 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as slow
| if(status_message = "Finished successfully",0,1) as fail
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
| count_distinct(query) as unique_queries,max(scanned_partition_count) as max_partitions,avg(scanned_partition_count) as avg_partitions,count_distinct(user_name) as users,sum(duration_s) as total_sec,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned,   sum(slow) as %"slow > 30s", sum(fail) as %"fail/cancelled" by user_name,query_type
//| replace (partitions,"\n",", ") as partitions
| sort bytes_scanned
| bytes_scanned / 1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb 
| total_sec / (60 * 60) as total_hours | fields -bytes_scanned,total_sec,users

| limit 200

queries.panelTitle: Gb Scan Top Users Over Time
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
| timeslice by {{timeslice}}
|sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes   by _timeslice,user_name
| total bytes as tb by _timeslice
 | bytes / tb as f | if (f <.03,"other",user_name) as user_name
| bytes / 1G as gb
| sum(gb) as gb_scan by _timeslice,user_name | replace (user_name,/@.+/,"") as user_name  
| fillmissing timeslice(15m) with 0 for	gb_scan | transpose row _timeslice column user_name

_index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory="view_and_tier_volume"
  | parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi 
  | json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as index, dataTier, bytes, count   
  | sum(bytes) as bytes | bytes/1024/1024/1024 /1024 as tb
| avg(tb) as ingest

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
//( query_type=*view*)

| sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes | bytes / (1024 * 1024 * 1024 ) as GB_Scan 
// make a lookup reference object of the last 24 hour scan total
| "YES" as dummy
| where [subquery from=(-24h): 
  _index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory="view_and_tier_volume"
  | parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi 
  | json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as index, dataTier, bytes, count   
  | sum(bytes) as bytes | bytes/1024/1024/1024 as gb
  | 1 as key
  | save /temp/ingest
  | "YES" as dummy | compose dummy
]
| 1 as key
| lookup gb from /temp/ingest on key=key
| gb_scan / gb as scan_ratio | fields scan_ratio

queries.panelTitle: Search Count By Band of Scanned Partitions By Query Type
Scan Bytes by Scanned Partition Band By Query Type
Users Scanning > 3 Partitions and > 10GB. Could benefit from training to add index
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
//| where execution_duration_ms > 30000
//not query_type = view*
not query_type = sumo*
| where scanned_partition_count >3 
| where data_scanned_bytes > ({{min_scan_gb_per_search}} * 1G)

| sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes,count as searches by user_name,scanned_partition_count //,query_type
| where bytes > 10000000000
| bytes /1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb | fields -bytes
| ceil(scanned_partition_count/5) * 5 as part_range
| total searches as total_searches by user_name,part_range
| concat(toint(part_range),": ",toint(total_searches)) as range_searches
| sort user_name,part_range
| values(range_searches) as %"range: num_searches",sum(scan_gb) as total_scan_gb,sum(searches) as total_searches by user_name
| replace(%"range: num_searches","\n","  ") as %"range: num_searches"
| sort total_scan_gb
| round(total_scan_gb / 1024,2) as total_scan_tb
| round(total_scan_gb) as total_scan_gb
| round(total_scan_gb / total_searches,1) as gb_per_search

queries.panelTitle: Infrequent Users Sorted By Scan Credits Estimate (@.016/scan GB)
queries.query:

queries.panelTitle: Top Scanners: Highest scan workloads by content_name, user,type
Dashboards: Highest Scan By Dashboard Name
Highest Scan Searches by total Scan GB. Use this panel to drill down to specific high scan searches.
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
{{{filter}}}
| where data_scanned_bytes > ({{min_scan_gb_per_search}} * 1G)
//| where execution_duration_ms > 15000
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| round(range_s/60/60/24) as range_day
| range_s/60 as range_min
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS

| values(scanned_partition_count) as partitions,values(user_name) as user_names,values(range_day) as range_days,avg(range_min) as range_minutes, sum(duration_s) as total_s,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned, sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events, avg(duration_s) as avg_duration_s by query_type,query,content_name
| parse regex field=query "(?i)(?<has_subquery>compare with timeshift|\[ *subquery:)" nodrop
| substring(query,0,{{search_max_chrs}}) as query
| bytes_scanned / 1G as gb_scan
| fields -bytes_scanned
| total_s / (60 * 60 ) as run_hours
| sort gb_scan | limit 100 | fields -total_s,_some_matched,run_hours
| replace (partitions,"\n",", ") as partitions

queries.panelTitle: Top Scanners > 100GB: User and Query Type. Use this panel to locate the user / workload combinations that drive high scans.
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 

| where data_scanned_bytes > (100 * 1G)
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
| if(status_message = "Finished successfully",0,1) as fail
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
| count_distinct(query) as unique_queries,max(scanned_partition_count) as max_partitions,count_distinct(user_name) as users,sum(duration_s) as total_sec,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned,   sum(fail) as %"fail/cancelled" by user_name,query_type
//| replace (partitions,"\n",", ") as partitions
| sort bytes_scanned
| bytes_scanned / 1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb 
| total_sec / (60 * 60) as total_hours | fields -bytes_scanned,total_sec,users
| round(scan_gb / searches,1) as scan_gb_per_search
| limit 200

// make a lookup reference object of the last 24 hour scan total
| "YES" as dummy
| where [subquery: 
  _index=sumologic_volume _sourceCategory="view_and_tier_volume"
  | parse regex "(?<data>\{[^\{]+\})" multi 
  | json field=data "field","dataTier","sizeInBytes","count" as index, dataTier, bytes, count

  | 1 as key
  | save /temp/ingest
  | "YES" as dummy | compose dummy
]
| 1 as key
| lookup gb from /temp/ingest on key=key
| gb_scan / gb as scan_ratio | fields scan_ratio

Flex Billable Scan By User Type
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
// search audit search term(s)

query_type=copilot
// flex billable
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Flex" as  scan_fl nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for billable scan
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Continuous" as  scan_con nodrop // value also turns up in flex orgs sometimes in small amounts
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Frequent" as  scan_fre nodrop
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Infrequent" as  scan_inf nodrop

// not flex billable
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "FlexSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // in a flex customer you will see this for CSE scanned logs (not flex billable)
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "ContinuousSecurity" as  scan_cse nodrop // CSE scan in a legacy org
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Security" as  scan_sec nodrop // reflected sec_* indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "Tracing" as  scan_trc nodrop // scan of tracing indexes
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown_by_metering_type "RCE" as  scan_RCE nodrop
// {}   note it's also possible to see an empty array

| if(isnull(scan_fl),0,scan_fl) as scan_fl
| if(isnull(scan_con),0,scan_con) as scan_con
| if(isnull(scan_fre),0,scan_fre) as scan_fre
| if(isnull(scan_inf),0,scan_inf) as scan_inf
| if(isnull(scan_cse),0,scan_cse) as scan_cse
| if(isnull(scan_sec),0,scan_sec) as scan_sec
| if(isnull(scan_trc),0,scan_trc) as scan_trc
| if(isnull(scan_RCE),0,scan_RCE) as scan_rce

| scan_fl + scan_con + scan_fre + scan_inf as scan_bytes_flex_billable
//| cse as scan_bytes_cse
| scan_sec + scan_trc + scan_rce as scan_bytes_not_flex_billable

| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/ (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as range_days
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s

| scan_bytes_flex_billable/1T as t
| where t > 0
| timeslice 1d
| sum(t) as flex_tb by user_name,_timeslice | transpose row _timeslice column user_name

not query_type=sumo* not user_name=*sumosupport*
user_name={{user_name}} query={{query_pattern}} query_type={{query_type}} analytics_tier={{tier}}

| if (isnull(inf_scan_bytes),0,inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes

| if (isnull(c_scan_bytes),0,c_scan_bytes) as c_scan_bytes

queries.panelTitle: E. Meta to Types and Users
queries.query:
(_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query) 
not query_type=sumo* not user_name=*sumosupport*
user_name={{user_name}} query={{query_pattern}} query_type={{query_type}} analytics_tier={{tier}}
| where query matches /{{query_regex}}/
//| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 ) as time_range_m
//| sort execution_duration_ms
| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as inf_scan_bytes nodrop
| if (isnull(inf_scan_bytes),0,inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes
| avg(execution_duration_ms) as avg_exec_ms,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as data_scanned_bytes, sum(inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes,sum(data_retrieved_bytes) as data_retrieved_bytes , sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events by user_name,query_type,query,scanned_partition_count,is_aggregate,analytics_tier,status_message //,session_id
| round((data_scanned_bytes /1024/1024/1024) * 10 )/10 as scan_gbytes
//| round((data_retrieved_bytes/1024/1024/1024) * 10 )/10 as retrieved_gbytes
| round((inf_scan_bytes/1024/1024/1024) * 10) / 10 as inf_scan_gbytes

//| round(avg_exec_ms / 1000) as avg_exec_s
| parse regex field = query "(?i)(?<meta>(?:_sourcename|_sourcecategory|_source|_sourcehost|_collector|_index|_datatier) *(?:=|matches|in)[ \"]*[\w+\*\",/:\\\.\_-]+)\"*"
| replace(meta,"\"","") as meta
| if (query_type = "Interactive Dashboard",searches,0) as dashboard
| if ( query_type = "Interactive Search",searches,0) as search
| if (query_type = "Scheduled Search",searches,0) as schedule_sch
| if (query_type = "Subquery",searches,0) as subquery
| if (query_type = "Monitors",searches,0) as monitors
| if (query_type = "View Maintenance",searches,0) as views
| if (query_type = "Search API",searches,0) as api

| if (query_type matches /(?i)compare|internal|subquery/,searches,0) as other

| sum(dashboard) as dashboards,sum(search) as search,sum(schedule_sch) as ss, sum(monitors) as monitor,sum(api) as api, sum(other) as other,sum(views) as views, sum(scan_gbytes) as scan_gbytes,sum(inf_scan_gbytes) as inf_scan_gbytes, count_distinct(user_name) as users,avg(scanned_partition_count) as partitions by meta
| sort meta asc

| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "Frequent" as f_scan_bytes nodrop
| json field=scanned_bytes_breakdown "Continuous" as c_scan_bytes nodrop

| if (isnull(inf_scan_bytes),0,inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes
| if (isnull(f_scan_bytes),0,f_scan_bytes) as f_scan_bytes
| if (isnull(c_scan_bytes),0,c_scan_bytes) as c_scan_bytes

| count as searches,  sum(inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes,sum(c_scan_bytes) as c_scan_bytes, sum(f_scan_bytes) as f_scan_bytes by user_name,query_type
| round((inf_scan_bytes /1024/1024/1024) * 10 )/10 as inf_scan_gb
| round((f_scan_bytes /1024/1024/1024) * 10 )/10 as f_scan_gb
| round((c_scan_bytes /1024/1024/1024) * 10 )/10 as c_scan_gb

| count_distinct(user_name) as users, sum(searches) as searches, sum(c_scan_gb) as c_scan_gb, sum(inf_scan_gb) as inf_scan_gb, sum(f_scan_gb) as f_scan_gb by query_type
| inf_scan_gb * .016 as inf_scan_credits | sort query_type asc

queries.panelTitle: Query Performance By Runtime Band A-F
queries.query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
| timeslice by {{timeslice}}
| "F >10m" as band
| if (execution_duration_ms <= (1000 * 60 * 10),"E 5-10m",band) as band
| if (execution_duration_ms <= (1000 * 60 * 5),"D 1-5m",band) as band
| if (execution_duration_ms <= (1000 * 60 * 1),"C 30-60s",band) as band
| if (execution_duration_ms <= (1000 * 30),"B 10-30s",band) as band
| if (execution_duration_ms <= (1000 * 10),"A <10s",band) as band
| count by band,_timeslice | transpose row _timeslice column band

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
query_type="interactive search"

| if(execution_duration_ms < 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as fast
| count as searches, sum(fast) as fast 
| 100 * (fast/searches) as fast_search_pct | avg( fast_search_pct)

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
query_type="interactive dashboard"

| if(execution_duration_ms < 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as fast
| count as searches, sum(fast) as fast 
| 100 * (fast/searches) as fast_search_pct | avg( fast_search_pct)

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
( query_type=monitor* or query_type=schedul*)

| if(execution_duration_ms < 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as fast
| count as searches, sum(fast) as fast 
| 100 * (fast/searches) as fast_search_pct | avg( fast_search_pct)

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
| where execution_duration_ms > 30000
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| round(range_s/60/60/24) as range_day
| range_s/60 as range_min
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
| substring(query,0,{{search_max_chrs}}) as query
| values(user_name) as user_names,values(range_day) as range_days,avg(range_min) as range_minutes,avg(scanned_partition_count) as partitions, sum(duration_s) as total_s,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned, sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events, avg(duration_s) as avg_duration_s by query_type,query
| bytes_scanned / 1G as gb_scan
| fields -bytes_scanned
| total_s / (60 * 60 ) as run_hours
| sort total_s | limit 100 | fields -total_s

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
//| where execution_duration_ms > 30000
| (query_end_time - query_start_time)/1000 as range_s
| execution_duration_ms /1000 as duration_s
| if(execution_duration_ms > 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as slow
| if(status_message = "Finished successfully",0,1) as fail
// AGGREGATE TO GET STATS
| count_distinct(user_name) as users,sum(duration_s) as total_sec,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as bytes_scanned, sum(retrieved_message_count) as events, pct(duration_s,50) as median_run_s , sum(slow) as %"slow > 30s", sum(fail) as %"fail/cancelled" by query_type
| sort bytes_scanned
| bytes_scanned / 1024/1024/1024 as scan_gb 
| total_sec / (60 * 60) as total_hours | fields -bytes_scanned,total_sec

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
( query_type=*api*)

| if(execution_duration_ms < 1000 * {{slow_seconds}},1,0) as fast
| count as searches, sum(fast) as fast 
| 100 * (fast/searches) as fast_search_pct | avg( fast_search_pct)

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query {{{filter}}}
| timeslice by {{timeslice}}
|sum(execution_duration_ms) as execution_duration_ms   by _timeslice,user_name
| total execution_duration_ms as ts by _timeslice
 | execution_duration_ms / ts as f | if (f <.005,"other",user_name) as user_name
| sum(execution_duration_ms) as execution_duration_ms by _timeslice,user_name
| fillmissing timeslice(15m) with 0 for	execution_duration_ms 
| replace (user_name,/@.+/,"") as user_name | transpose row _timeslice column user_name

| parse regex field = query "(?i)(?<meta>_sourcename|_sourcecategory|_source|_sourcehost|_collector|_index) *(?<op>=|matches|in)[ \"]*(?<value>[\w+\*\",/-]+)\"*"
| replace(value,"\"","") as value

| sum(searches) as searches, sum(scan_gbytes) as scan_gbytes, sum(inf_scan_gbytes) as inf_scan_gbytes, sum(retrieved_events) as retrieved_events, max(scanned_partition_count) as scanned_partitions by user_name, query_type,meta,value,analytics_tier | sort meta asc, user_name asc
//| sort avg_exec_ms

(_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query) not query_type=sumo*
user_name={{user_name}} query={{query_pattern}} query_type={{query_type}} analytics_tier={{tier}}

| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 ) as time_range_m

| avg(execution_duration_ms) as avg_exec_ms,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as data_scanned_bytes, sum(inf_scan_bytes) as inf_scan_bytes,sum(data_retrieved_bytes) as data_retrieved_bytes , sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events,avg(time_range_m) as avg_time_range_m by user_name,query_type,query,scanned_partition_count,is_aggregate,analytics_tier,status_message //,session_id

| round((inf_scan_bytes/1024/1024/1024) * 10) / 10 as inf_scan_gbytes

| round(avg_exec_ms / 1000) as avg_exec_s
| parse regex field = query "(?i)(?<meta>_sourcename|_sourcecategory|_source|_sourcehost|_collector|_index) *(?<op>=|matches|in)[ \"]*(?<value>[\w+\*\",/-]+)\"*"

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes 
_sourceCategory=view_volume

| parse regex "\"(?<view>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi

| sum(bytes) as size_in_bytes by view
| size_in_bytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 as gbytes
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by view

| "continuous" as tier
| if(view matches /{{freq_regex}}/,"frequent",tier) as tier
| if(view matches /{{infreq_regex}}/,"infrequent",tier) as tier
| if (view matches /(?)CSE_[RS][ei]/,"cse_data",tier) as tier
| view as rename_for_report
| if(view matches "_sumologic_report*","saved_views",view) as rename_for_report
| if (view matches "*sumologic*","sumologic_internal",rename_for_report) as rename_for_report
| 20 as cr_cont
| 9 as cr_freq
| 0.4 as cr_infreq
| if (tier = "continuous",cr_cont * gbytes,0) as ingest_credits_consumed
| if (tier = "frequent",cr_freq * gbytes,ingest_credits_consumed) as ingest_credits_consumed
| if (tier = "infrequent",cr_infreq * gbytes,ingest_credits_consumed) as ingest_credits_consumed
| gbytes as gbytes
| sort ingest_credits_consumed
| fields -cr_cont,cr_freq,cr_infreq
| ingest_credits_consumed / gbytes as CPGI

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes 
_sourceCategory=view_volume

| parse regex "\"(?<view>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi

| if(view matches "_sumologic_report*","saved_views",view) as view
//| if(view matches "*volume*","internal",view) as view
| min(_messagetime) as s, max(_messagetime) as e , sum(bytes) as size_in_bytes by view
| size_in_bytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 as gbytes
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by view,s,e
| "continuous" as tier
| if(view matches /{{freq_regex}}/,"frequent",tier) as tier
| if(view matches /{{infreq_regex}}/,"infrequent",tier) as tier
| if (view matches /(?)CSE_[RS][ei]/,"cse_data",tier) as tier
| where !(tier = "cse_data")

| if (tier = "continuous",gbytes * ((100 - {{cse_pct}})  /100),0) as continuous
| if (tier = "continuous",gbytes * ({{cse_pct}}  /100),0) as cse
| if (tier = "frequent", gbytes,0) as frequent
| if (tier = "infrequent",gbytes,0) as infrequent


| 20 as cr_cont
| 25 as cr_cse
| 9 as cr_freq
| 0.4 as cr_infreq

| if (tier = "continuous",cr_cont * gbytes * ((100 - {{cse_pct}})  /100),0) as cr_continuous
| if (tier = "continuous",cr_cse * gbytes * ({{cse_pct}}  /100),0) as cr_cse
| if (tier = "frequent",cr_freq * gbytes,0) as cr_frequent
| if (tier = "infrequent",cr_infreq * gbytes,0) as cr_infrequent

| min(s) as s, max(e) as e,sum(cr_continuous) as cr_cont, sum(cr_cse) as cr_cse, sum(cr_frequent) as cr_frequent,sum(cr_infrequent) as cr_infrequent,
sum(continuous) as continuous, sum(cse) as cse,sum(frequent) as frequent, sum(infrequent) as infrequent

| (e - s) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as days
| continuous / days as continuous
| cse / days as cse
| frequent/ days as frequent
| infrequent / days as infrequent

| cr_cont / days as  cr_cont
| cr_cse / days as cr_cse
| cr_frequent/ days as cr_frequent
| cr_infrequent / days as cr_infrequent
| cr_cont + cr_cse + cr_frequent + cr_infrequent as cr_per_day
| continuous + cse + frequent + infrequent as gb_per_day
| cr_per_day / gb_per_day as CGPI
| fields -s,e

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes 
_sourceCategory=view_volume

| parse regex "\"(?<view>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi

| if(view matches "_sumologic_report*","saved_views",view) as view
//| if(view matches "*volume*","internal",view) as view
| min(_messagetime) as s, max(_messagetime) as e , sum(bytes) as size_in_bytes by view
| size_in_bytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 as gbytes
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by view,s,e
| "continuous" as tier
| if(view matches /{{freq_regex}}/,"frequent",tier) as tier
| if(view matches /{{infreq_regex}}/,"infrequent",tier) as tier
| if (view matches /(?)CSE_[RS][ei]/,"cse_data",tier) as tier
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by tier

| 20 as cr_cont
| 25 as cr_cse
| 9 as cr_freq
| 0.4 as cr_infreq
| cr_cont * gbytes * ((100 - {{cse_pct}} ) /100) as cr_cont
| cr_cse * gbytes * ({{cse_pct}} /100)  as cr_cse
| if (tier = "continuous", cr_cont+cr_cse ,0) as credits
| if (tier = "frequent",cr_freq * gbytes,credits) as credits
| if (tier = "infrequent",cr_infreq * gbytes,credits) as credits


| if(tier  = "frequent",gbytes,0) as frequent
| if (tier = "continuous",gbytes,0) as continuous
| if(tier = "infrequent",gbytes,0) as infrequent
| sum(continuous) as continuous,sum(frequent) as frequent, sum(infrequent) as infrequent

| 20 as cr_cont
| 25 as cr_cse
| cr_cont * continuous * ((100 - {{cse_pct}} ) /100) as cr_cont
| cr_cse * continuous * ({{cse_pct}} /100)  as cr_cse

| ( cr_cont + cr_cse  + (frequent * 9) +  (infrequent * .4)  ) / (continuous + frequent + infrequent) as CPGI | avg(CPGI) as CPGI

queries.panelTitle: Estimated Period and Lifetime Storage Credit Use For {{average_retention_days}} Days Retention
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes 
_sourceCategory=view_volume

| parse regex "\"(?<view>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi
| bytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 as gbytes

| min(_messagetime) as f, max(_messagetime) as l,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by view
| where gbytes > 0
| "continuous" as tier
| if(view matches /{{freq_regex}}/,"frequent",tier) as tier
| if(view matches /{{infreq_regex}}/,"infrequent",tier) as tier
| if (view matches /(?)CSE_[RS][ei]/,"cse_data",tier) as tier

| view as rename_for_report
| if(view matches "_sumologic_report*","saved_views",view) as rename_for_report
| if (view matches "*sumologic*","sumologic_internal",rename_for_report) as rename_for_report

| 0.0067 as cr_storage
|  0.0015 as cr_infreq_storage

| if (tier = "infrequent",cr_infreq_storage * gbytes,cr_storage * gbytes) as storage_credits
| ( (l - f )/ (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) as duration_d
| (storage_credits / duration_d) * {{average_retention_days}} as estimated_lifetime_storage_credits

| max(duration_d) as period_days,sum(gbytes) as gbytes, sum(estimated_lifetime_storage_credits) as estimated_lifetime_storage_credits by tier
| round(period_days,2) as period_days
| round(gbytes,2) as gbytes_total
| round(gbytes * ( 1/period_days),3) as gbytes_per_day
| round(estimated_lifetime_storage_credits,2) as storage_credits_per_day_full_retention
| round(estimated_lifetime_storage_credits /  {{average_retention_days}},3)  as storage_credits
| fields -gbytes
| fields tier, period_days,gbytes_total,gbytes_per_day,storage_credits,storage_credits_per_day_full_retention

queries.panelTitle: Estimated Storage  Credits Per Day With {{average_retention_days}} Days Retention
queries.query:
_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes 
_sourceCategory=view_volume

| parse regex "\"(?<view>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi
| bytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 as gbytes

| min(_messagetime) as f, max(_messagetime) as l,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by view

| "continuous" as tier
| if(view matches /{{freq_regex}}/,"frequent",tier) as tier
| if(view matches /{{infreq_regex}}/,"infrequent",tier) as tier
| if (view matches /(?)CSE_[RS][ei]/,"cse_data",tier) as tier

| view as rename_for_report
| if(view matches "_sumologic_report*","saved_views",view) as rename_for_report
| if (view matches "*sumologic*","sumologic_internal",rename_for_report) as rename_for_report

| 0.0067 as cr_storage
|  0.0015 as cr_infreq_storage

| if (tier = "infrequent",cr_infreq_storage * gbytes,cr_storage * gbytes) as storage_credits
| ( (l - f )/ (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) as duration_d
| (storage_credits / duration_d) * {{average_retention_days}} as estimated_lifetime_storage_credits

| max(duration_d) as period_days,sum(gbytes) as gbytes, sum(estimated_lifetime_storage_credits) as estimated_lifetime_storage_credits by tier
| round(period_days,2) as period_days
| round(gbytes,2) as gbytes_total
| round(gbytes * ( 1/period_days),3) as gbytes_per_day
| round(estimated_lifetime_storage_credits,2) as estimated_storage_credits_per_day_full_retention
| round(estimated_lifetime_storage_credits /  {{average_retention_days}},3)  as storage_credits
| fields -gbytes
| fields tier, period_days,gbytes_total,gbytes_per_day,storage_credits,estimated_storage_credits_per_day_full_retention

| sum( estimated_storage_credits_per_day_full_retention) as estimated_storage_credits_per_day_full_retention

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes 
_sourceCategory=view_volume

| parse regex "\"(?<view>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi

| if(view matches "_sumologic_report*","saved_views",view) as view
//| if(view matches "*volume*","internal",view) as view
| min(_messagetime) as s, max(_messagetime) as e , sum(bytes) as size_in_bytes by view
| size_in_bytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 as gbytes
| min(s) as s, max(e) as e ,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by view,s,e
| "continuous" as tier
| if(view matches /{{freq_regex}}/,"frequent",tier) as tier
| if(view matches /{{infreq_regex}}/,"infrequent",tier) as tier
| if (view matches /(?)CSE_[RS][ei]/,"cse_data",tier) as tier
| min(s) as s, max(e) as e ,sum(gbytes) as gbytes by tier
| if(tier  = "frequent",gbytes,0) as frequent
| if (tier = "continuous",gbytes,0) as continuous
| if(tier = "infrequent",gbytes,0) as infrequent
| min(s) as s, max(e) as e ,sum(continuous) as continuous,sum(frequent) as frequent, sum(infrequent) as infrequent
| (e - s) / ( 1000 * 60 * 60 * 24) as range_days
| ((( frequent + infrequent) * 20 - ((frequent * 9) + (infrequent * .4))) /range_days) * 365 as annual_ingest_credits_saved | fields annual_ingest_credits_saved

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query analytics_tier = "Infrequent" !(user_name=*sumologic.com) !(status_message="Query Failed")	
| fields data_scanned_bytes, query, is_aggregate, query_type, remote_ip, retrieved_message_count, scanned_message_count, scanned_partition_count, session_id, status_message, user_name
|data_scanned_bytes / 1Gi as sizeInGB
| (sizeInGB * 0.016 ) as credits_consumed    | sum(credits_consumed)
| credits_consumed /7  * 365 as credits_consumed

_sourceCategory=* not _sourcecategory=asoc/* not _sourcecategory=cse/* //AND (AND _messageid=*0 or _messageid=*5)
| _view as index
| if (isempty(_siemforward),"CIP","CSE") as forwarding
| sum(_size) as bytes, count_distinct(index) as partitions, count_distinct(_sourcecategory) as categories by forwarding
| bytes / 1024 /1024 as mb | total mb as tmb | (mb / tmb) * 100  as percent 
| fields forwarding, mb,categories,percent 
| if (forwarding = "CIP",20,25) as %"cr/gb"
| round(percent,1) as percent
| round(mb) as mb

queries.query:
(_index=sumologic_volume) _sourcecategory=sourcehost_and_tier_volume
| parse regex "\{\"field\":\"(?<value>[^\"]+)\",\"dataTier\":\"(?<dataTier>[^\"]+)\",\"sizeInBytes\":(?<sizeInBytes>[^\"]+),\"count\":(?<count>[^\"]+)\}," multi

//| timeslice by 15m
| sum(count) as events,sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value,_sourcecategory
//| sum(sizeinbytes) as bytes by datatier, value,_timeslice
| bytes /1024/1024/1024 as gb | sort gb
| parse field=_sourcecategory "*_and_tier_volume" as dimension 

// remove long categories
| if (length(value) > 35,concat(substring(value,0,35),"..."),value) as value 
| sum(events) as events,sum(gb) as gbytes by dimension,value,dataTier


| parse regex field=value "^(?<value2>[^\/]+\/[^\/]+\/)" nodrop
| if(value matches /^[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+/,"<ip>",value) as value
| if (isempty(value2),value,value2) as value
| replace(value,/[0-9]{4,}[0-9\.]*/,"<n>") as value
// *** THIS LINE rolls up small sources into 'other' ***
//| bytes / 1024/1024/1024 as gb
| if (datatier="Frequent",gbytes * 9,gbytes * 20) as credits
| if (datatier="Infrequent",gbytes * .4,credits) as credits
| total credits as tc 
| credits / tc as fraction
| fraction * 100 as percent

|sum(credits) as credits,count as rows, sum(events) as events,sum(gbytes) as gbytes, sum(percent) as percent by datatier,dimension,value
| credits/gbytes as %"cr/gb"
| sort credits

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  
analytics_tier=*infrequent*
user_name={{user_name}}
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as scan_inf  
| timeslice by 1d

| sum(scan_inf)  as bytes by user_name, _timeslice 
| (bytes/1024/1024/1024 )* 0.016 as credits | fields -bytes
| transpose row _timeslice column user_name

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  
analytics_tier=*infrequent*
user_name={{user_name}}
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as scan_inf  

| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 /60/24) as range_days
| parse regex field=query "(?i)_datatier *= *(?<datatier>[IFA][a-zA-Z]+)" nodrop
| if (isempty(datatier),"by index",datatier) as datatier
| (scan_inf/1024/1024/1024 )* 0.016 as credits 
| replace(status_message,/,.*/,"") as status_message
| round(range_days,1) as range_days
| min(query_start_time) as f,max(query_start_time) as l,count_distinct(query_start_time) as start_times,count as searches, sum(credits) as credits, sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events,values(range_days) as range_days,avg(scanned_partition_count) as partitions, sum(scan_inf) as scan_inf,values(status_message) as statuses, values(query_type) as types by user_name,query,datatier  //,session_id

//| fields -bytes
| (scan_inf/1024/1024/1024 ) as scan_gb
| ( l -f) / (1000 * 60) as start_time_spread_min
| fields -scan_inf,l,f
| sort credits | limit 100

_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query  
analytics_tier=*infrequent*
user_name={{user_name}}
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as scan_inf  

| ((query_end_time - query_start_time ) /1000 / 60 /60/24) as range_days
| parse regex field=query "(?i)_datatier *= *(?<datatier>[IFA][a-zA-Z]+)" nodrop
| if (isempty(datatier),"by index",datatier) as scope
| replace(status_message,/,.*/,"") as status_message
| count_distinct(query) as queries,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as total_bytes,  sum(retrieved_message_count) as retrieved_events,sum(range_days) as range_days,avg(scanned_partition_count) as avg_partitions, sum(scan_inf) as scan_inf, values(status_message) as statuses by user_name,scope,query_type | limit 100 //,session_id

| (scan_inf/1024/1024/1024 )* 0.016 as credits //| fields -bytes
| (scan_inf/1024/1024/1024 ) as scan_gb
| (total_bytes/1024/1024/1024 ) as total_gb

| fields -scan_inf,total_bytes
| sort credits

| sort credits
| credits/queries as cr_per_query

user_name={{user_name}}
| json field =scanned_bytes_breakdown "Infrequent" as scan_inf  
| timeslice
| sum(scan_inf)  as bytes by user_name, _timeslice 
| (bytes/1024/1024/1024 )* 0.016 as credits | sum(credits) as credits by user_name  | sort credits

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes
 _sourceCategory="{{dimension}}_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<dimension>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi
| where dimension matches "{{filter}}"
| bytes/1024/1024/1024 as gbytes 
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by dimension
| sort gbytes
| total gbytes as tgb 
| (gbytes / tgb ) * 100 as ingest_percent | fields -tgb

_index=sumologic_volume sizeInBytes
 _sourceCategory="{{dimension}}_volume"
| parse regex "\"(?<dimension>[^\"]+)\"\:\{\"sizeInBytes\"\:(?<bytes>\d+),\"count\"\:(?<count>\d+)\}" multi
| where dimension matches "{{filter}}"
| bytes/1024/1024/1024 as gbytes 
| sum(gbytes) as gbytes by dimension
| sort gbytes
| compare with timeshift 14d
| gbytes - gbytes_14d as change
| ( change / gbytes) * 100 as change_pct
| where abs(change_pct) > 25 | sort change

cat path://"{{lookup_path}}"
| tourl(trim(link),concat("Open: ",trim(link))) as link
| where tolowercase(title) matches tolowercase("{{search_title}}")
| where title matches /(?i){{regex_title}}/
| toint(index) as id
| count by id, title, link | sort title asc | fields -_count
 | sort title asc

cat path://"{{lookup_path}}"
| tourl(trim(link),concat("Open: ",trim(link))) as link
| where tolowercase(title) matches tolowercase("{{search_title}}")
| where title matches /(?i){{regex_title}}/
| parse regex field=title "(?<word>\w+)" multi
| count by word
| where length(word) > 3
//| where !(word in ("Micro","lesson","Lesson")) 
| sort word asc
| 1 as i
| now() as _messagetime
| transactionize i (merge i takefirst, word join with " ") 
| count by word | fields -_count
